220|7dcb1c|    func updateUIView(_ textView: UITextView, context: Context) {
221|855109|        // CRITICAL: Update coordinator's parent reference to current struct
222|333ede|        // SwiftUI creates new struct instances on each update, so this keeps
223|620e32|        // coordinator in sync with current bindings and properties
224|aa6fd6|        context.coordinator.parent = self
225|d6ed84|        
226|0a58ec|        // CRITICAL FIX: Apply initial highlighting FIRST on the very first updateUIView call
227|211a1a|        // This fixes the bug where syntax highlighting only appears after typing.
228|815fc1|        // makeUIView applies it, but the view may not be fully in hierarchy yet,
229|ab2ed7|        // causing the attributed text to be lost. This ensures it's applied reliably.
230|d721d6|        if !context.coordinator.hasAppliedInitialHighlighting && !textView.text.isEmpty {
231|140558|            context.coordinator.applySyntaxHighlighting(to: textView)
232|4dd2eb|            context.coordinator.hasAppliedInitialHighlighting = true
233|5f3077|        }
234|d6ed84|        
235|31e4e9|        // Update colors when theme changes
236|5ee36b|        // NOTE: Only set backgroundColor and tintColor here. Do NOT set textColor
237|d2a31c|        // as it interferes with attributedText syntax highlighting colors.
238|2ba8b3|        // The foreground color is handled entirely by the attributedText.
239|e5b95a|        textView.backgroundColor = UIColor(ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme.editorBackground)
240|0c4521|        textView.tintColor = UIColor(ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme.cursor)
241|d6ed84|        
242|330f1a|        if let editorView = textView as? EditorTextView {
243|397219|            editorView.updateThemeColors(theme: ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme)
244|5f3077|        }
245|d6ed84|        
246|c506e2|        // Update font size if changed (using explicit fontSize parameter for proper SwiftUI updates)
247|1e3b94|        if let currentFont = textView.font, currentFont.pointSize != fontSize {
248|e844dd|            let selectedRange = textView.selectedRange
249|441e85|            textView.font = UIFont.monospacedSystemFont(ofSize: fontSize, weight: .regular)
250|140558|            context.coordinator.applySyntaxHighlighting(to: textView)
251|335b1a|            textView.selectedRange = selectedRange
252|3070d1|            
253|53ed35|            // Update line height
254|f4daab|            if let font = textView.font {
255|f143b8|                DispatchQueue.main.async {
256|6dfb70|                    self.lineHeight = font.lineHeight
257|4e2d32|                }
258|a7dc16|            }
259|5f3077|        }
260|d6ed84|        
261|d764b8|        // Update text if changed externally
262|c4b3de|        if textView.text != text {
263|e844dd|            let selectedRange = textView.selectedRange
264|bf1757|            textView.text = text
265|140558|            context.coordinator.applySyntaxHighlighting(to: textView)
266|4dd2eb|            context.coordinator.hasAppliedInitialHighlighting = true
267|335b1a|            textView.selectedRange = selectedRange
268|cbbdc8|        } else if context.coordinator.lastThemeId != ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme.id {
269|921fd1|            // Re-apply highlighting if theme changed
270|140558|            context.coordinator.applySyntaxHighlighting(to: textView)
271|5f3077|        }
272|d6ed84|        
273|98290a|        // Handle minimap scrolling - but ONLY if user is NOT actively scrolling
274|5fbd94|        // This prevents the editor from fighting against user scroll due to async binding lag
275|935237|        if scrollPosition != context.coordinator.lastKnownScrollPosition && scrollPosition >= 0 && !context.coordinator.isUserScrolling {
276|7582fa|            // Update lastKnownScrollPosition FIRST to prevent race condition
277|2bbfef|            // where user scroll gets overridden by stale binding value
278|76f423|            context.coordinator.lastKnownScrollPosition = scrollPosition
279|8543a8|            context.coordinator.scrollToLine(scrollPosition, in: textView)
280|5f3077|        }
281|adc83b|
282|649b47|        // Handle line selection requests (e.g. tapping line numbers)
283|89e0a7|        if let requested = requestedLineSelection,
284|16d365|           requested != context.coordinator.lastRequestedLineSelection {
285|b908db|            context.coordinator.lastRequestedLineSelection = requested
286|161f74|            context.coordinator.scrollToAndSelectLine(requested, in: textView)
287|8b95ef|            // Defer @Binding update to avoid "Publishing changes from within view updates"
288|ebb427|            DispatchQueue.main.async {
289|2fa7d1|                self.requestedLineSelection = nil
290|a7dc16|            }
291|5f3077|        }
292|adc83b|
293|e31050|        // Handle cursor index requests (e.g. accepting autocomplete)
294|503648|        if let requested = requestedCursorIndex,
295|9a2334|           requested != context.coordinator.lastRequestedCursorIndex {
296|89b5a6|            context.coordinator.lastRequestedCursorIndex = requested
297|40dc8c|            // Use UTF-16 count for NSRange compatibility
298|6d09ca|            let textLength = (textView.text as NSString?)?.length ?? 0
299|97ec0c|            let safeIndex = max(0, min(requested, textLength))
300|f9ad9a|            textView.selectedRange = NSRange(location: safeIndex, length: 0)

624|d6ed84|

673|801f1b|        func updateCursorPosition(_ textView: UITextView) {
674|8a6136|            guard let selectedRange = textView.selectedTextRange else { return }
675|1cf07c|            let cursorPosition = textView.offset(from: textView.beginningOfDocument, to: selectedRange.start)
676|3070d1|            
677|9c7413|            // PERF: Count newlines directly instead of creating substring + array
678|b3d375|            let text = textView.text ?? ""
679|2bf772|            var lineNumber = 1
680|12ead2|            var columnStart = 0
681|3070d1|            
682|600b13|            let endIndex = text.index(text.startIndex, offsetBy: min(cursorPosition, text.count), limitedBy: text.endIndex) ?? text.endIndex
683|731d50|            for (i, char) in text[..<endIndex].enumerated() {
684|45ea4a|                if char == "\n" {
685|4ae0f3|                    lineNumber += 1
686|ebd6eb|                    columnStart = i + 1
687|4e2d32|                }
688|a7dc16|            }
689|3070d1|            
690|570dba|            let column = cursorPosition - columnStart + 1
691|3070d1|            
692|ebb427|            DispatchQueue.main.async {
693|29327f|                self.parent.currentLineNumber = lineNumber
694|d6146d|                self.parent.currentColumn = column
695|cce19c|                self.parent.cursorIndex = cursorPosition
696|a7dc16|            }
697|5f3077|        }

699|59cd86|        func updateScrollPosition(_ textView: UITextView) {
700|ccc9da|            guard let font = textView.font else { return }
701|735647|            let lineHeight = font.lineHeight
702|bbbc6f|            let yOffset = textView.contentOffset.y
703|01e084|            let line = Int(yOffset / lineHeight)
704|adc83b|
705|180d34|            // Update lastKnownScrollPosition synchronously to prevent feedback loops
706|26a14a|            lastKnownScrollPosition = line

708|92bcff|            // Defer @Binding updates to avoid "Publishing changes from within view updates"

711|2d1197|                self.parent.scrollOffset = yOffset

715|de8692|        func scrollToLine(_ line: Int, in textView: UITextView) {

717|3bb00c|            isUpdatingFromMinimap = true
718|3070d1|            
719|77df51|            // Optimized: Use NSString enumeration instead of splitting entire text
720|e8726f|            let nsText = textView.text as NSString
721|d5ece7|            var currentLine = 0

723|8120e8|            var foundLine = false
724|3070d1|            
725|2683dd|            nsText.enumerateSubstrings(in: NSRange(location: 0, length: nsText.length), options: [.byLines, .substringNotRequired]) { _, substringRange, _, stop in
726|98624a|                if currentLine == line {
727|ef913a|                    characterPosition = substringRange.location
728|5e8bff|                    foundLine = true
729|bee479|                    stop.pointee = true
730|d253ab|                    return
731|4e2d32|                }
732|12fb7d|                currentLine += 1
733|a7dc16|            }
734|3070d1|            
735|803af8|            guard foundLine || (line == 0 && nsText.length == 0) else {
736|d66072|                isUpdatingFromMinimap = false
737|53ab34|                return
738|a7dc16|            }
739|3070d1|            
740|7351c8|            if let position = textView.position(from: textView.beginningOfDocument, offset: characterPosition) {
741|85b93b|                let rect = textView.caretRect(for: position)
742|b8f2c8|                let targetY = max(0, rect.origin.y)
743|3fa036|                textView.setContentOffset(CGPoint(x: 0, y: targetY), animated: true)
744|a7dc16|            }
745|3070d1|            
746|f90505|            DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.3) {
747|8ef1d8|                self.isUpdatingFromMinimap = false
748|a7dc16|            }
749|5f3077|        }

754|d5ece7|            var currentLine = 0

784|197af8|        private var isApplyingHighlighting = false
785|d6ed84|        
786|eacbbe|        func applySyntaxHighlighting(to textView: UITextView) {
787|a71899|            // Guard against reentrancy - this can happen if attributedText assignment
788|eea832|            // triggers delegate callbacks that call this method again
789|8ebaf1|            guard !isApplyingHighlighting else { return }
790|cfeb02|            isApplyingHighlighting = true
791|819888|            defer { isApplyingHighlighting = false }
792|3070d1|            
793|6035ba|            let theme = ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme
794|66d0d9|            lastThemeId = theme.id
795|adc83b|
796|e30342|            let highlighter = VSCodeSyntaxHighlighter(theme: theme, fontSize: parent.editorCore.editorFontSize)
797|4ba13c|            let attributedText = highlighter.highlight(textView.text, filename: parent.filename)
798|adc83b|
799|e844dd|            let selectedRange = textView.selectedRange
800|adc83b|
801|b096af|            // NOTE: We intentionally do NOT manipulate undoManager.disableUndoRegistration/enableUndoRegistration
802|bf1d61|            // here. UITextView's internal undo manager state machine is fragile and can crash with
803|b755b7|            // "enableUndoRegistration may only be invoked with matching call to disableUndoRegistration"
804|dd5c2c|            // when attributedText assignment triggers internal undo callbacks.
805|75d880|            // 
806|ff6bb4|            // Instead, we let the system handle undo naturally. The trade-off is that syntax highlighting
807|92400f|            // changes might add noise to the undo stack, but this is preferable to crashing.
808|3070d1|            
809|82cb50|            textView.attributedText = attributedText
810|335b1a|            textView.selectedRange = selectedRange
811|adc83b|
812|cc87a2|            // Set typing attributes so newly typed characters have correct base styling
813|246348|            // This prevents flicker during the debounce period before full highlighting runs
814|810685|            let fontSize = parent.editorCore.editorFontSize
815|426131|            textView.typingAttributes = [
816|69640c|                .font: UIFont.monospacedSystemFont(ofSize: fontSize, weight: .regular),
817|247992|                .foregroundColor: UIColor(theme.editorForeground)
818|324820|            ]
819|adc83b|
820|b7d37f|            // FEAT-044: restore matching bracket highlight after re-attributing text
821|a9be52|            updateMatchingBracketHighlight(textView)
822|5f3077|        }

824|adb6bb|        func handlePeekDefinition(in textView: UITextView) {
825|8a6136|            guard let selectedRange = textView.selectedTextRange else { return }
826|b3d375|            let text = textView.text ?? ""
827|3070d1|            
828|329559|            if let range = textView.tokenizer.rangeEnclosingPosition(selectedRange.start, with: .word, inDirection: UITextDirection(rawValue: 1)) {
829|1782e1|                 let location = textView.offset(from: textView.beginningOfDocument, to: range.start)
830|3adfc8|                 
831|ed41fe|                 let prefix = String(text.prefix(location))
832|769324|                 let sourceLine = prefix.components(separatedBy: CharacterSet.newlines).count - 1
833|3adfc8|                 
834|f5e652|                 parent.editorCore.triggerPeekDefinition(
835|563d7b|                     file: parent.filename,
836|1f4af0|                     line: sourceLine,
837|e11de1|                     content: text,
838|143058|                     sourceLine: sourceLine
839|8f7d53|                 )
840|a7dc16|            }
841|5f3077|        }

884|8a6136|            guard let selectedRange = textView.selectedTextRange else { return }
885|b3d375|            let text = textView.text ?? ""
886|3070d1|

889|082b9d|                let location = textView.offset(from: textView.beginningOfDocument, to: lineRange.start)

891|3a65b5|                let nsRange = NSRange(location: location, length: length)
892|216278|                
893|cf8d27|                if nsRange.location + nsRange.length <= (text as NSString).length {
894|01a1cd|                    let lineText = (text as NSString).substring(with: nsRange)
895|c7935c|                    let trimmed = lineText.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
896|dd2193|                    
897|63b596|                    // Check if line starts with a comment
898|e2244f|                    let isCommented = trimmed.hasPrefix("//") || trimmed.hasPrefix("#") || trimmed.hasPrefix("/*")
899|dd2193|

933|3e8cf7|        @objc func handlePinch(_ gesture: UIPinchGestureRecognizer) {
934|39696a|            guard let textView = gesture.view as? UITextView else { return }
935|adc83b|
936|b228bd|            switch gesture.state {
937|a23e11|            case .began:
938|dec980|                // Store the initial font size when pinch begins
939|9058cf|                initialFontSize = parent.editorCore.editorFontSize
940|adc83b|
941|4be33b|            case .changed:
942|92d96c|                // Calculate new font size based on pinch scale
943|781835|                let newSize = initialFontSize * gesture.scale
944|adc83b|
945|2886da|                // Clamp font size between 8 and 32
946|a3b76b|                let clampedSize = min(max(newSize, 8), 32)
947|adc83b|
948|e3e6c9|                // Update EditorCore's font size (this will trigger updateUIView)
949|61d876|                parent.editorCore.editorFontSize = clampedSize
950|adc83b|
951|9b2543|            case .ended, .cancelled:
952|759143|                // Optional: snap to nearest whole number or standard size
953|8ca956|                let finalSize = round(parent.editorCore.editorFontSize)
954|1f70dc|                parent.editorCore.editorFontSize = min(max(finalSize, 8), 32)
955|adc83b|
956|ea3438|            default:
957|74cfd8|                break
958|a7dc16|            }
959|5f3077|        }

1706|d6ed84|

1708|f3155b|        switch language {

1738|6375f9|    private func highlightBracketPairs(_ attributed: NSMutableAttributedString, text: String) {
1739|15e10d|        let brackets: [Character] = ["{", "}", "[", "]", "(", ")"]
1740|d14333|        let pairs: [Character: Character] = ["}": "{", "]": "[", ")": "("]
1741|d6ed84|        
1742|99a4a9|        var stack: [(char: Character, index: Int, depth: Int)] = []
1743|6e4cea|        let colors = [

1752|44166e|        // Scan text for brackets
1753|439013|        // Note: In a real implementation, we should skip brackets inside strings/comments
1754|2bdb67|        // But since we apply this LAST, we can try to respect existing string/comment colors
1755|f89202|        // OR implement a more robust parser. For now, simple scan.
1756|d6ed84|        
1757|8945b5|        // Optimization: Use scanner or direct iteration
1758|4fc7f4|        let nsString = text as NSString
1759|9203e3|        var index = 0
1760|d6ed84|        
1761|810ca8|        while index < text.utf16.count {
1762|4f9ad4|            let char = nsString.character(at: index)
1763|7e8ad3|            if let scalar = UnicodeScalar(char) {
1764|e4a370|                let c = Character(scalar)
1765|216278|                
1766|cbd2a8|                if brackets.contains(c) {
1767|1b3670|                    // Check if it's already colored as string/comment (heuristic)
1768|149e03|                    // If color is string/comment, skip
1769|850f04|                    // (Requires iterating attributes, which is slow. We'll just apply on top for now)
1770|dd2193|                    
1771|996925|                    if let open = pairs[c] { // Closing bracket
1772|6114f3|                        if let last = stack.last, last.char == open {
1773|1469ee|                            // Match found
1774|28d302|                            let depth = last.depth
1775|4ca6c1|                            let color = colors[depth % colors.count]
1776|e4abf2|                            
1777|c40423|                            attributed.addAttribute(.foregroundColor, value: color, range: NSRange(location: index, length: 1))
1778|9f0f64|                            attributed.addAttribute(.foregroundColor, value: color, range: NSRange(location: last.index, length: 1))
1779|e4abf2|                            
1780|fd0ca5|                            stack.removeLast()
1781|65e2f4|                        } else {
1782|79dbca|                            // Mismatched or extra closing bracket - unexpected
1783|b93d0a|                            // Keep default color or mark red? Default for now.
1784|392b35|                        }
1785|3a0c6a|                    } else { // Opening bracket
1786|0232e2|                        let depth = stack.count
1787|802404|                        stack.append((c, index, depth))
1788|956cfe|                        
1789|6eedf4|                        // We'll color it when (and if) we find the match, or here?
1790|74f3b7|                        // Better to color here tentatively, but matching is better.
1791|66092b|                        // Let's color tentatively based on depth.
1792|f150d9|                        let color = colors[depth % colors.count]
1793|65df06|                        attributed.addAttribute(.foregroundColor, value: color, range: NSRange(location: index, length: 1))
1794|c9717a|                    }

131|6224c3|    func updateSuggestions(for text: String, cursorPosition: Int) {
132|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))

134|0efe98|            apply(items: [])
135|bef5d6|            return
136|5f3077|        }
137|adc83b|
138|c2e8b0|        let prefixLower = context.prefix.lowercased()
139|042f0f|        guard !prefixLower.isEmpty else {
140|bacf86|            // If user just typed a dot, show members even with empty prefix.
141|a46e04|            if context.isMemberCompletion, let base = context.memberBase {
142|c9f7f8|                let members = memberCandidates(forBase: base)
143|92798d|                let items = members.map { Suggestion(kind: .member, displayText: $0, score: 1000) }

145|f5a6eb|            } else {
146|4c73d4|                apply(items: [])
147|a7dc16|            }
148|bef5d6|            return
149|5f3077|        }

231|f6601a|    private func completionContext(in text: String, cursorPosition: Int) -> CompletionContext? {
232|4c2df9|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return nil }
233|d6ed84|        
234|42915b|        // Safety check: ensure cursorPosition is within bounds
235|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))
236|1fae78|        let cursorIndex = text.index(text.startIndex, offsetBy: safeCursor)
237|adc83b|
238|5aebf3|        // Find start of current identifier (letters/digits/_).
239|39f169|        var start = cursorIndex
240|26ebb3|        while start > text.startIndex {
241|c5c76e|            let prev = text.index(before: start)
242|9f8a31|            if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
243|1929f8|                start = prev
244|f5a6eb|            } else {
245|74cfd8|                break
246|a7dc16|            }
247|5f3077|        }
248|adc83b|
249|bf292f|        let prefix = String(text[start..<cursorIndex])
250|adc83b|
251|824562|        // Member completion if immediately preceded by '.'
252|e374b4|        var isMember = false
253|e47c72|        var memberBase: String? = nil
254|adc83b|
255|0c2c38|        if start > text.startIndex {
256|2aa058|            let dotIndex = text.index(before: start)
257|88bd65|            if text[dotIndex] == "." {
258|ca8397|                isMember = true
259|adc83b|
260|6f6689|                // Parse identifier before '.'
261|91f615|                var baseEnd = dotIndex
262|521a36|                var baseStart = baseEnd
263|5fa357|                while baseStart > text.startIndex {
264|56e352|                    let prev = text.index(before: baseStart)
265|2a8ddd|                    if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
266|fbabfa|                        baseStart = prev
267|540066|                    } else {
268|28a64b|                        break
269|c9717a|                    }
270|4e2d32|                }
271|f96abf|                let base = String(text[baseStart..<baseEnd])
272|ce472b|                if !base.isEmpty {
273|b9c992|                    memberBase = base
274|4e2d32|                }
275|a7dc16|            }
276|5f3077|        }
277|adc83b|
278|081616|        return CompletionContext(prefix: prefix,
279|c93ac4|                                 replacementRange: start..<cursorIndex,
280|a50c25|                                 isMemberCompletion: isMember,
281|ee9636|                                 memberBase: memberBase)
282|27e597|    }
283|adc83b|
284|818e4b|    private func isIdentifierChar(_ c: Character) -> Bool {
285|c233b9|        // Swift identifiers are more complex, but this is enough for basic autocomplete.
286|a164d4|        return c.isLetter || c.isNumber || c == "_"
287|27e597|    }
288|adc83b|
289|117bcf|    private func memberCandidates(forBase base: String) -> [String] {
290|cf1cb2|        // Basic heuristic: only match known stdlib types by exact name.
291|622249|        if let members = memberCompletions[base] { return members }
292|b72a10|        return []
293|27e597|    }
294|adc83b|
295|6ba6d8|    private func extractSymbols(from text: String) -> [String] {
296|1098cf|        // Very lightweight symbol extraction: looks for common declarations.
297|141450|        // Intentionally best-effort; keeps FEAT-046 self-contained.
298|f746d2|        var results = Set<String>()
299|adc83b|
300|f97d0d|        func addMatches(pattern: String) {
301|ca0afa|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return }
302|6c811f|            let ns = text as NSString
303|b25f5b|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
304|d25847|            regex.enumerateMatches(in: text, options: [], range: range) { match, _, _ in
305|14f5aa|                guard let match, match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return }
306|345d9a|                let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
307|de56e8|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { return }
308|8989a1|                let name = ns.substring(with: nameRange)
309|66b469|                if !name.isEmpty { results.insert(name) }
310|a7dc16|            }
311|5f3077|        }
312|adc83b|
313|a1c515|        // func Foo
314|cd4071|        addMatches(pattern: "\\bfunc\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
315|5eaefb|        // class/struct/enum/protocol/typealias Foo
316|685691|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:class|struct|enum|protocol|typealias)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
317|3764b8|        // let/var foo (captures first name before : = , )
318|bbf05c|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)(?=\\s*[:=,])")
319|adc83b|
320|01a90c|        return results.sorted { $0.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1) == .orderedAscending }
321|27e597|    }
322|adc83b|
323|1470f2|    private func mergeAndSort(_ items: [Suggestion]) -> [Suggestion] {
324|ff1146|        // Keep highest-scored entry per id.
325|f6e288|        var bestById: [String: Suggestion] = [:]
326|686171|        for item in items {
327|0701eb|            if let existing = bestById[item.id] {
328|d5a6de|                if item.score > existing.score {
329|763640|                    bestById[item.id] = item
330|4e2d32|                }
331|f5a6eb|            } else {
332|b949a2|                bestById[item.id] = item
333|a7dc16|            }
334|5f3077|        }
335|adc83b|
336|cfe5f9|        return bestById.values.sorted {
337|708c2d|            if $0.score != $1.score { return $0.score > $1.score }
338|e5aa71|            return $0.displayText.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1.displayText) == .orderedAscending
339|5f3077|        }
340|27e597|    }
341|adc83b|
342|ba218c|    private func apply(items: [Suggestion]) {
343|02d13b|        suggestionItems = items
344|f6da05|        suggestions = items.map { $0.displayText }
345|c77b90|        showSuggestions = !items.isEmpty
346|81a6a8|        selectedIndex = 0
347|27e597|    }

239|a4a35b|    private func getTreeSitterLanguage(for filename: String) -> Runestone.TreeSitterLanguage? {
240|98942b|        let ext = (filename as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
241|82335e|        let lastComponent = (filename as NSString).lastPathComponent.lowercased()
242|d6ed84|        
243|ab25ec|        // Special-case filenames without extensions
244|013551|        if lastComponent == "dockerfile" || lastComponent.hasPrefix("dockerfile.") {
245|274790|            return nil // Bash support not in package list yet
246|5f3077|        }
247|bf07fd|        if lastComponent == ".env" || lastComponent.hasPrefix(".env.") {
248|3e3e36|            return nil // Plain text
249|5f3077|        }
250|828d40|        if lastComponent == "makefile" || lastComponent == "gnumakefile" {
251|274790|            return nil // Bash support not in package list yet
252|5f3077|        }
253|4b7128|        if lastComponent == "podfile" || lastComponent == "gemfile" {
254|46c419|            return nil // Ruby support not in package list yet
255|5f3077|        }
256|0efae9|        if lastComponent == "package.json" || lastComponent == "tsconfig.json" {
257|4d9419|            return TreeSitterLanguage.json
258|5f3077|        }
259|d6ed84|        
260|f60e4e|        switch ext {
261|4c2810|        // Swift
262|1c8542|        case "swift":
263|376f7d|            return TreeSitterLanguage.swift
264|d6ed84|        
265|20fa65|        // JavaScript
266|cd5864|        case "js", "mjs", "cjs", "jsx":
267|fd14ee|            return TreeSitterLanguage.javaScript
268|d6ed84|        
269|194537|        // TypeScript - use JavaScript as fallback
270|a4d183|        case "ts", "mts", "cts", "tsx":
271|fd14ee|            return TreeSitterLanguage.javaScript
272|d6ed84|        
273|a87c1b|        // Python
274|85dfd3|        case "py", "pyw", "pyi":
275|4462da|            return TreeSitterLanguage.python
276|d6ed84|        
277|cd9e63|        // Go
278|ee50e6|        case "go":
279|44c0af|            return TreeSitterLanguage.go
280|d6ed84|        
281|fd611a|        // Rust
282|c28591|        case "rs":
283|9af65c|            return TreeSitterLanguage.rust
284|d6ed84|        
285|08c082|        // JSON
286|7aa37f|        case "json", "jsonc":
287|4d9419|            return TreeSitterLanguage.json
288|d6ed84|        
289|8aadd1|        // HTML
290|8f517a|        case "html", "htm", "xhtml":
291|d6b81f|            return TreeSitterLanguage.html
292|d6ed84|        
293|b0d395|        // CSS
294|c4efc3|        case "css", "scss":
295|27b343|            return TreeSitterLanguage.css
296|d6ed84|

310|6a2db5|    private func countLines(in text: String) -> Int {
311|ee3501|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return 1 }
312|c746a1|        var count = 1
313|48817a|        var index = text.startIndex
314|42136d|        while index < text.endIndex {
315|4396fc|            if text[index] == "\n" {
316|31d0c1|                count += 1
317|a7dc16|            }
318|3a0fcb|            index = text.index(after: index)
319|5f3077|        }
320|c7b6e6|        return count
321|27e597|    }

356|02717e|            // Mark that user has edited - blocks setState() calls until file switch
357|f51822|            hasBeenEdited = true
358|3070d1|            
359|d2cd8b|            // Cancel any pending debounced update

361|3070d1|

363|36310e|            let workItem = DispatchWorkItem { [weak self] in
364|150252|                guard let self = self else { return }
365|84d674|                self.isUpdatingFromTextView = true
366|0ae33b|                defer { self.isUpdatingFromTextView = false }
367|216278|

370|216278|

379|c3b6ab|            DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + debounceInterval, execute: workItem)
380|5f3077|        }

433|e844dd|            let selectedRange = textView.selectedRange

448|3070d1|

450|2ea6e9|            columnNumber = cursorLocation - currentLineStart + 1

453|ebb427|            DispatchQueue.main.async {

456|975d29|                self.parent.currentColumn = columnNumber

591|77216f|    func textColor(for rawHighlightName: String) -> UIColor? {
592|364fdf|        // Map TreeSitter highlight names to colors
593|077102|        // See: https://tree-sitter.github.io/tree-sitter/syntax-highlighting#highlights
594|a3c6a6|        let highlightName = rawHighlightName.lowercased()
595|d6ed84|        
596|3e8301|        // Debug: Log ALL highlight names to console (ENABLED FOR DEBUGGING)
597|1aa7f0|        print("🎨 HIGHLIGHT: '\(rawHighlightName)' -> ", terminator: "")
598|d6ed84|        
599|5f2431|        // Keywords
600|347daa|        if highlightName.contains("keyword") {
601|e0cdb7|            print("keyword (blue)")
602|11656d|            return _keywordColor
603|5f3077|        }
604|d6ed84|        
605|c13ace|        // JSON/Object keys - MUST return color for specific patterns
606|164d0a|        // TreeSitter JSON emits BOTH "string.special.key" AND "string" for keys
607|63f969|        // We handle specific patterns first, then skip generic "string" to avoid overwrite
608|929452|        if highlightName.hasPrefix("string.special") ||
609|7d9926|           highlightName.contains("label") ||
610|81c371|           highlightName.contains("property.definition") {
611|7612b6|            print("key/label (light blue)")
612|5086b7|            return _variableColor  // Light blue #9CDCFE for keys
613|5f3077|        }
614|d6ed84|        
615|5fe933|        // Strings - but NOT if it's JUST "string" (let specific matches win)
616|dcb001|        // Only color strings that are clearly values, not potential keys
617|ab3d14|        if highlightName.contains("string") {
618|5655ac|            print("string (orange)")
619|f09755|            return _stringColor  // Orange #CE9178 for string values
620|5f3077|        }
621|d6ed84|        
622|f425cd|        // Numbers and constants
623|a2036f|        if highlightName.contains("number") || highlightName == "constant.numeric" {
624|57bea5|            print("number (green)")
625|da9aee|            return _numberColor
626|5f3077|        }
627|d6ed84|        
628|185d89|        // Comments
629|f4b237|        if highlightName.contains("comment") {
630|e46058|            return _commentColor
631|5f3077|        }
632|d6ed84|        
633|4d76db|        // Functions and methods
634|915dec|        if highlightName.contains("function") || highlightName.contains("method") {
635|69dae5|            return _functionColor
636|5f3077|        }
637|d6ed84|        
638|5853d5|        // Types, classes, structs
639|a68e63|        if highlightName.contains("type") || highlightName.contains("class") ||
640|fe7d45|           highlightName.contains("struct") || highlightName.contains("interface") ||
641|7850d5|           highlightName.contains("enum") {
642|079364|            return _typeColor
643|5f3077|        }
644|d6ed84|        
645|100acb|        // Variables, parameters, properties
646|87a47d|        if highlightName.contains("variable") || highlightName.contains("parameter") ||
647|6198a9|           highlightName.contains("property") || highlightName.contains("field") {
648|0e23b9|            return _variableColor
649|5f3077|        }
650|d6ed84|        
651|f1a54a|        // Constants and booleans - use keyword color
652|cc358f|        if highlightName.contains("constant") || highlightName.contains("boolean") {
653|11656d|            return _keywordColor
654|5f3077|        }
655|d6ed84|        
656|b158fb|        // Operators - use keyword color
657|1a986d|        if highlightName.contains("operator") {
658|11656d|            return _keywordColor
659|5f3077|        }
660|d6ed84|        
661|8737fd|        // Namespaces and modules - use type color
662|d04ebe|        if highlightName.contains("namespace") || highlightName.contains("module") {
663|079364|            return _typeColor
664|5f3077|        }
665|d6ed84|        
666|d204ef|        // Tags (HTML, XML) - use type color
667|e21ab6|        if highlightName.contains("tag") {
668|079364|            return _typeColor
669|5f3077|        }
670|d6ed84|        
671|2abb6b|        // Attributes - use variable color
672|91f255|        if highlightName.contains("attribute") {
673|0e23b9|            return _variableColor
674|5f3077|        }
675|d6ed84|        
676|bb1e1f|        // Spell checking highlights - ignore (return nil to use default)
677|1dc697|        if highlightName.contains("spell") {
678|1c8557|            return nil
679|5f3077|        }
680|d6ed84|        
681|3d22f9|        // Include/import statements - use keyword color
682|fd8f58|        if highlightName.contains("include") {
683|11656d|            return _keywordColor
684|5f3077|        }
685|d6ed84|        
686|c1e1a1|        // Default: use standard text color
687|e35567|        print("nil (default)")
688|c2ae65|        return nil
689|27e597|    }

703|d6ed84|        
704|b72a10|        return []

106|1bdc19|        if let language = getTreeSitterLanguage(for: filename) {

113|d6ed84|

127|e66206|    /// Updates suggestions based on the current text and cursor.
128|2cbc84|    ///
129|d91771|    /// FEAT-046: extracts symbols from `text` and mixes them into the suggestion list.
130|785f23|    /// FEAT-047: adds a curated set of Swift stdlib completions.
131|6224c3|    func updateSuggestions(for text: String, cursorPosition: Int) {
132|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))
133|97fb6b|        guard let context = completionContext(in: text, cursorPosition: safeCursor) else {
134|0efe98|            apply(items: [])
135|bef5d6|            return
136|5f3077|        }
137|adc83b|
138|c2e8b0|        let prefixLower = context.prefix.lowercased()
139|042f0f|        guard !prefixLower.isEmpty else {
140|bacf86|            // If user just typed a dot, show members even with empty prefix.
141|a46e04|            if context.isMemberCompletion, let base = context.memberBase {
142|c9f7f8|                let members = memberCandidates(forBase: base)
143|92798d|                let items = members.map { Suggestion(kind: .member, displayText: $0, score: 1000) }
144|0b887c|                apply(items: items)
145|f5a6eb|            } else {
146|4c73d4|                apply(items: [])
147|a7dc16|            }
148|bef5d6|            return
149|5f3077|        }
150|adc83b|
151|3e8861|        var candidates: [Suggestion] = []
152|adc83b|
153|67a42f|        // FEAT-046: current file symbols
154|f70c93|        let symbols = extractSymbols(from: text)
155|27a302|        candidates.append(contentsOf: symbols
156|488fb3|            .filter { $0.lowercased().hasPrefix(prefixLower) }
157|9de4dd|            .map { Suggestion(kind: .symbol, displayText: $0, score: 900) })
158|adc83b|
159|5f2431|        // Keywords
160|1a6e20|        candidates.append(contentsOf: keywords
161|488fb3|            .filter { $0.lowercased().hasPrefix(prefixLower) }
162|b40e7e|            .map { Suggestion(kind: .keyword, displayText: $0, score: 800) })
163|adc83b|
164|fcf131|        // FEAT-047: Swift stdlib (top level)
165|d76253|        candidates.append(contentsOf: stdlibTopLevel
166|488fb3|            .filter { $0.lowercased().hasPrefix(prefixLower) }
167|3cfc84|            .map { Suggestion(kind: .stdlib, displayText: $0, score: 700) })
168|adc83b|
169|07fafa|        // Member completions (very small heuristic-based set)
170|7f874f|        if context.isMemberCompletion, let base = context.memberBase {
171|68d0ac|            let members = memberCandidates(forBase: base)
172|a69811|            candidates.append(contentsOf: members
173|585680|                .filter { $0.lowercased().hasPrefix(prefixLower) }
174|73995e|                .map { Suggestion(kind: .member, displayText: $0, score: 1000) })
175|5f3077|        }
176|adc83b|
177|41630d|        // De-dupe + rank
178|673af4|        let merged = mergeAndSort(candidates)
179|678fc2|        apply(items: merged)
180|27e597|    }

182|530c2a|    func selectNext() {
183|1052ec|        guard showSuggestions else { return }

207|85ca8d|    func commitCurrentSuggestion(into text: inout String, cursorPosition: inout Int) {
208|f15814|        guard let suggestion = suggestionItems[safe: selectedIndex], showSuggestions else { return }
209|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))
210|2e795d|        guard let context = completionContext(in: text, cursorPosition: safeCursor) else { return }
211|adc83b|
212|9bab77|        let replacementRange = context.replacementRange

214|adc83b|
215|8d1541|        // Move cursor to end of inserted text.
216|b73dac|        let newCursorOffset = text.distance(from: text.startIndex, to: replacementRange.lowerBound) + suggestion.insertText.count
217|68489c|        cursorPosition = min(newCursorOffset, text.count)
218|adc83b|
219|be2759|        hideSuggestions()
220|27e597|    }

224|7d7b95|    private struct CompletionContext {
225|0dee4e|        let prefix: String
226|b4787e|        let replacementRange: Range<String.Index>
227|56198f|        let isMemberCompletion: Bool
228|79772b|        let memberBase: String?
229|27e597|    }
230|adc83b|
231|f6601a|    private func completionContext(in text: String, cursorPosition: Int) -> CompletionContext? {
232|4c2df9|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return nil }
233|d6ed84|        
234|42915b|        // Safety check: ensure cursorPosition is within bounds
235|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))
236|1fae78|        let cursorIndex = text.index(text.startIndex, offsetBy: safeCursor)
237|adc83b|
238|5aebf3|        // Find start of current identifier (letters/digits/_).
239|39f169|        var start = cursorIndex
240|26ebb3|        while start > text.startIndex {
241|c5c76e|            let prev = text.index(before: start)
242|9f8a31|            if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
243|1929f8|                start = prev
244|f5a6eb|            } else {
245|74cfd8|                break
246|a7dc16|            }
247|5f3077|        }
248|adc83b|
249|bf292f|        let prefix = String(text[start..<cursorIndex])
250|adc83b|
251|824562|        // Member completion if immediately preceded by '.'
252|e374b4|        var isMember = false
253|e47c72|        var memberBase: String? = nil
254|adc83b|
255|0c2c38|        if start > text.startIndex {
256|2aa058|            let dotIndex = text.index(before: start)
257|88bd65|            if text[dotIndex] == "." {
258|ca8397|                isMember = true
259|adc83b|
260|6f6689|                // Parse identifier before '.'
261|91f615|                var baseEnd = dotIndex
262|521a36|                var baseStart = baseEnd
263|5fa357|                while baseStart > text.startIndex {
264|56e352|                    let prev = text.index(before: baseStart)
265|2a8ddd|                    if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
266|fbabfa|                        baseStart = prev
267|540066|                    } else {
268|28a64b|                        break
269|c9717a|                    }
270|4e2d32|                }
271|f96abf|                let base = String(text[baseStart..<baseEnd])
272|ce472b|                if !base.isEmpty {
273|b9c992|                    memberBase = base
274|4e2d32|                }
275|a7dc16|            }
276|5f3077|        }
277|adc83b|
278|081616|        return CompletionContext(prefix: prefix,
279|c93ac4|                                 replacementRange: start..<cursorIndex,
280|a50c25|                                 isMemberCompletion: isMember,
281|ee9636|                                 memberBase: memberBase)
282|27e597|    }
283|adc83b|
284|818e4b|    private func isIdentifierChar(_ c: Character) -> Bool {
285|c233b9|        // Swift identifiers are more complex, but this is enough for basic autocomplete.
286|a164d4|        return c.isLetter || c.isNumber || c == "_"
287|27e597|    }
288|adc83b|
289|117bcf|    private func memberCandidates(forBase base: String) -> [String] {
290|cf1cb2|        // Basic heuristic: only match known stdlib types by exact name.
291|622249|        if let members = memberCompletions[base] { return members }
292|b72a10|        return []
293|27e597|    }
294|adc83b|
295|6ba6d8|    private func extractSymbols(from text: String) -> [String] {
296|1098cf|        // Very lightweight symbol extraction: looks for common declarations.
297|141450|        // Intentionally best-effort; keeps FEAT-046 self-contained.
298|f746d2|        var results = Set<String>()
299|adc83b|
300|f97d0d|        func addMatches(pattern: String) {
301|ca0afa|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return }
302|6c811f|            let ns = text as NSString
303|b25f5b|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
304|d25847|            regex.enumerateMatches(in: text, options: [], range: range) { match, _, _ in
305|14f5aa|                guard let match, match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return }
306|345d9a|                let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
307|de56e8|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { return }
308|8989a1|                let name = ns.substring(with: nameRange)
309|66b469|                if !name.isEmpty { results.insert(name) }
310|a7dc16|            }
311|5f3077|        }
312|adc83b|
313|a1c515|        // func Foo
314|cd4071|        addMatches(pattern: "\\bfunc\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
315|5eaefb|        // class/struct/enum/protocol/typealias Foo
316|685691|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:class|struct|enum|protocol|typealias)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
317|3764b8|        // let/var foo (captures first name before : = , )
318|bbf05c|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)(?=\\s*[:=,])")
319|adc83b|
320|01a90c|        return results.sorted { $0.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1) == .orderedAscending }

220|7dcb1c|    func updateUIView(_ textView: UITextView, context: Context) {
221|855109|        // CRITICAL: Update coordinator's parent reference to current struct
222|333ede|        // SwiftUI creates new struct instances on each update, so this keeps
223|620e32|        // coordinator in sync with current bindings and properties

705|46d3db|    private func displayText(for lineIndex: Int) -> String {
706|5d97cf|        switch lineNumbersStyle {
707|a6eb36|        case "relative":
708|b0622f|            let lineNumber = lineIndex + 1
709|44bb33|            if lineNumber == currentLine { return "\(lineNumber)" }
710|5e67df|            return "\(abs(lineNumber - currentLine))"
711|adc83b|
712|5040ac|        case "interval":
713|b0622f|            let lineNumber = lineIndex + 1
714|bc3fe3|            return (lineNumber == 1 || lineNumber % 5 == 0) ? "\(lineNumber)" : ""
715|adc83b|
716|520b7d|        default:
717|3880c0|            return "\(lineIndex + 1)"
718|5f3077|        }
719|27e597|    }

192|46d058|                            endLine: index,
193|64e6ca|                            type: .comment,
194|0e7feb|                            label: "Comment"
195|78dc58|                        ))
196|c9717a|                    }
197|4e2d32|                }
198|f5a6eb|            } else {
199|0b3758|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
200|a7dc16|            }
201|3070d1|            
202|3d946d|            // MARK: - Class/Struct/Enum/Protocol/Extension Detection
203|2f1070|            if let declaration = detectDeclaration(trimmed) {
204|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
205|2b937f|                    blockStack.append((declaration.type, index, declaration.label))
206|fdd0e2|                } else {
207|7ec133|                    // Declaration without opening brace - look ahead for it
208|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
209|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)
210|c09b95|                        blockStack.append((declaration.type, index, declaration.label))
211|c9717a|                    }
212|4e2d32|                }
213|a7dc16|            }
214|3070d1|            
215|9273f4|            // MARK: - Function/Method Detection
216|8fb15a|            if let functionInfo = detectFunction(trimmed) {
217|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
218|072276|                    blockStack.append((.function, index, functionInfo))
219|fdd0e2|                } else {
220|ca50d4|                    // Function without opening brace - look ahead
221|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
222|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)
223|568400|                        blockStack.append((.function, index, functionInfo))
224|c9717a|                    }
225|4e2d32|                }
226|a7dc16|            }
227|3070d1|            
228|1e5bf2|            // MARK: - Control Flow Detection (if, guard, for, while, switch, etc.)
229|6b5dd6|            if let controlFlowLabel = detectControlFlow(trimmed) {
230|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
231|cb4212|                    blockStack.append((.controlFlow, index, controlFlowLabel))
232|fdd0e2|                } else {
233|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
234|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)
235|648280|                        blockStack.append((.controlFlow, index, controlFlowLabel))
236|c9717a|                    }
237|4e2d32|                }
238|a7dc16|            }
239|3070d1|            
240|b850f8|            // MARK: - Generic Block Detection
241|83f6cf|            // Avoid adding a generic block for a standalone "{" that belongs to a previously detected declaration.
242|bcf366|            if trimmed.hasSuffix("{"),
243|bd639e|               trimmed != "{",
244|f372eb|               !braceLinesClaimed.contains(index),
245|097ec3|               !isDeclarationLine(trimmed),
246|747356|               !isFunctionLine(trimmed) {
247|d74eec|                blockStack.append((.genericBlock, index, nil))
248|a7dc16|            }
249|adc83b|
250|caca44|            _ = leadingWhitespace // keep param for potential future heuristics
251|5f3077|        }
252|d6ed84|        
253|a60e7c|        // Handle any remaining unclosed blocks
254|193bf7|        while let lastBlock = blockStack.popLast() {
255|30813f|            if lines.count - 1 - lastBlock.startLine > 1 {
256|e50ab8|                regions.append(FoldRegion(
257|42046c|                    startLine: lastBlock.startLine,
258|a646f4|                    endLine: lines.count - 1,
259|68bd66|                    type: lastBlock.type,
260|2cb6f6|                    label: lastBlock.label
261|2188d8|                ))
262|a7dc16|            }
263|5f3077|        }
264|d6ed84|        
265|da4698|        // Sort regions by start line
266|e60f91|        regions.sort { $0.startLine < $1.startLine }
267|d6ed84|        
268|5f2f76|        self.foldRegions = regions
269|d6ed84|        
270|3b484c|        // Store regions in the per-file dictionary
271|8c6b47|        if let fileId = currentFileId {
272|823f0a|            foldRegionsByFile[fileId] = regions
273|5f3077|        }
274|d6ed84|        
275|83ae12|        // Restore previous fold state for this file

277|b86c9c|            restoreFoldState(for: filePath)

279|d6ed84|        
280|08ca44|        updateCollapsedLines()

285|d80e09|    private func detectRegionStart(_ line: String) -> String? {
286|2a6674|        // C# / VS style regions
287|1989c4|        if line.hasPrefix("#region") {
288|08b9aa|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#region")
289|94d9b5|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Region"

291|39fca1|        // Objective-C pragma marks
292|667815|        if line.hasPrefix("#pragma mark") {
293|4621b4|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#pragma mark")
294|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
295|5f3077|        }
296|ccd53a|        // Swift MARK comments
297|b5e23f|        if line.contains("MARK:") {
298|504937|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "MARK:")
299|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
300|5f3077|        }
301|c9afee|        // TODO/FIXME regions
302|453092|        if line.contains("TODO:") {
303|a4bc68|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "TODO:")
304|5b14a7|            return "TODO: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
305|5f3077|        }
306|92ac0a|        if line.contains("FIXME:") {
307|0b0cff|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "FIXME:")
308|218d1e|            return "FIXME: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
309|5f3077|        }
310|c2ae65|        return nil
311|27e597|    }
312|b4687f|    
313|c62450|    private func detectRegionEnd(_ line: String) -> Bool {
314|6c0837|        return line.hasPrefix("#endregion") || 
315|325a81|               line == "// MARK: -" ||
316|52ea28|               line.hasPrefix("#pragma mark -")
317|27e597|    }
318|b4687f|    
319|c6e97d|    private func detectCommentStart(_ line: String) -> Bool {
320|1cbff6|        return line.hasPrefix("/*") && !line.contains("*/")

3|6505f2|/// A lightweight inlay-hints engine used to show inline type annotations.
4|63c993|///
5|18e543|/// Scope (FEAT-133):
6|1f06c1|/// - Detect simple Swift variable declarations without explicit types.
7|6b0114|/// - Infer basic types from the initializer expression.
8|b1b02e|/// - Return hint objects with line/column + a display string (e.g. ": Int").
9|4f8cca|final class InlayHintsManager {
10|5960e0|    static let shared = InlayHintsManager()
11|54113e|    private init() {}
12|adc83b|
13|d9f5b5|    // MARK: - Models
14|adc83b|
15|14e2da|    struct InlayHint: Identifiable, Equatable {
16|d16339|        let id = UUID()
17|adc83b|
18|7a2975|        /// 0-based line index.
19|c0eddc|        let line: Int
20|adc83b|
21|efa22a|        /// 0-based UTF16 column index within the line.
22|1b9532|        let column: Int
23|adc83b|
24|c52f44|        /// Render-ready hint text (e.g. ": Int").
25|aa57fc|        let text: String
26|27e597|    }
27|adc83b|
28|36e755|    // MARK: - Public API
29|adc83b|
30|2ce197|    func hints(for code: String, language: CodeLanguage) -> [InlayHint] {
31|b95802|        guard language == .swift else { return [] }
32|bb2b0b|        return swiftTypeHints(for: code)
33|27e597|    }
34|adc83b|
35|52c601|    // MARK: - Swift parsing
36|adc83b|
37|16c9d6|    private func swiftTypeHints(for code: String) -> [InlayHint] {
38|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
39|46c824|        var result: [InlayHint] = []
40|adc83b|
41|225f78|        // Matches:
42|e2c046|        //   let x = 5
43|2cac4f|        //   var name = "abc"
44|21217b|        // Avoids explicit type annotations because the pattern does not accept `:` before `=`.
45|49e410|        let pattern = "^\\s*(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*=\\s*(.+)$"
46|72432c|        let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: [])
47|adc83b|
48|d1a1ab|        for (lineIndex, line) in lines.enumerated() {
49|cbe876|            let trimmed = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
50|9b2e7c|            guard !trimmed.hasPrefix("//"), !trimmed.isEmpty else { continue }
51|adc83b|
52|18a8aa|            let nsLine = line as NSString
53|89c109|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: nsLine.length)
54|c471d9|            guard let match = regex?.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: range) else { continue }
55|ad3867|            guard match.numberOfRanges >= 3 else { continue }
56|adc83b|
57|423174|            let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
58|3c5579|            let rhsRange = match.range(at: 2)
59|7a7150|            if nameRange.location == NSNotFound || rhsRange.location == NSNotFound { continue }
60|adc83b|
61|165da4|            // Basic sanity checks: ignore tuple bindings like `let (a, b) = ...`
62|679645|            let name = nsLine.substring(with: nameRange)
63|5c9927|            guard !name.isEmpty else { continue }
64|adc83b|
65|666b05|            // RHS, stripped of trailing `//` comments (naive but practical).
66|53413c|            var rhs = nsLine.substring(with: rhsRange)
67|8beea4|            if let commentRange = rhs.range(of: "//") {
68|a56309|                rhs = String(rhs[..<commentRange.lowerBound])
69|a7dc16|            }
70|107569|            rhs = rhs.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
71|adc83b|
72|8f6e07|            // Infer a type. If we can’t infer, don’t create a hint.
73|992808|            guard let inferred = inferSwiftType(from: rhs) else { continue }
74|adc83b|
75|ed8c63|            // Column for hint placement = end of identifier.
76|f4b52b|            let hintColumn = nameRange.location + nameRange.length
77|32af9e|            result.append(InlayHint(line: lineIndex, column: hintColumn, text: ": \(inferred)"))
78|5f3077|        }
79|adc83b|
80|67ed82|        return result
81|27e597|    }
82|adc83b|
83|014518|    // MARK: - Swift type inference (basic)
84|adc83b|
85|e4ea7a|    private func inferSwiftType(from rawExpression: String) -> String? {
86|3784b4|        let expr = rawExpression.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
87|a14679|        guard !expr.isEmpty else { return nil }
88|adc83b|
89|ea35f3|        // Bool
90|62989c|        if expr == "true" || expr == "false" { return "Bool" }
91|adc83b|
92|5f3b7c|        // String literal (simple)
93|553d7e|        if expr.hasPrefix("\"") { return "String" }
94|adc83b|
95|f70754|        // Numeric: Int
96|b5aa27|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+$") { return "Int" }
97|f87d78|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0x[0-9A-Fa-f]+$") { return "Int" }
98|212646|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0b[01]+$") { return "Int" }
99|d18d43|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0o[0-7]+$") { return "Int" }
100|adc83b|
101|e6218e|        // Numeric: Double (Swift defaults floating-point literals to Double)
102|53b861|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+\\.\\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\\d+)?$") { return "Double" }
103|71e012|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\\d+)$") { return "Double" }
104|adc83b|
105|69d592|        // Array / Dictionary literals
106|20ec44|        if expr.hasPrefix("[") {
107|ce2ebb|            if let dictType = inferDictionaryType(from: expr) { return dictType }
108|f27fb4|            if let arrayType = inferArrayType(from: expr) { return arrayType }
109|5f3077|        }
110|adc83b|
111|c1c62e|        // Constructor-looking calls: `TypeName(...)` (biased toward UpperCamelCase types)
112|c8a287|        if let typeName = firstRegexGroup(expr, pattern: "^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*\\(") {
113|7cdb04|            return typeName
114|5f3077|        }
115|adc83b|
116|9ff15e|        // Enum/static member: `TypeName.member`
117|7c8b37|        if let typeName = firstRegexGroup(expr, pattern: "^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\.[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$") {
118|7cdb04|            return typeName
119|5f3077|        }
120|adc83b|
121|c2ae65|        return nil
122|27e597|    }
123|adc83b|
124|ebc532|    private func inferArrayType(from expr: String) -> String? {
125|53c5a0|        let trimmed = expr.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
126|c8c4b9|        guard trimmed.hasPrefix("[") && trimmed.hasSuffix("]") else { return nil }
127|adc83b|
128|81b2b5|        let inner = trimmed.dropFirst().dropLast().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
129|4d16d8|        if inner.isEmpty { return "[Any]" }
130|adc83b|
131|bdbc65|        // Take the first top-level element (naive: split by comma).
132|51ddab|        let firstPart = inner.split(separator: ",", maxSplits: 1, omittingEmptySubsequences: true).first
133|3197f4|        guard let first = firstPart.map(String.init)?.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines), !first.isEmpty else {
134|88e905|            return "[Any]"
135|5f3077|        }
136|adc83b|
137|e844da|        if let elementType = inferSwiftType(from: first) {
138|655e59|            return "[\(elementType)]"
139|5f3077|        }
140|adc83b|
141|77d208|        return "[Any]"
142|27e597|    }
143|adc83b|
144|f7b9b1|    private func inferDictionaryType(from expr: String) -> String? {
145|53c5a0|        let trimmed = expr.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
146|c8c4b9|        guard trimmed.hasPrefix("[") && trimmed.hasSuffix("]") else { return nil }
147|adc83b|
148|85eff8|        // Fast check: dictionary literals must contain `:` somewhere.
149|8a247d|        guard trimmed.contains(":") else { return nil }
150|adc83b|
151|81b2b5|        let inner = trimmed.dropFirst().dropLast().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
152|be74cb|        if inner.isEmpty { return "[AnyHashable: Any]" }
153|adc83b|
154|141281|        // Grab the first `key: value` pair (naive: up to first comma).
155|53580e|        let firstPair = inner.split(separator: ",", maxSplits: 1, omittingEmptySubsequences: true).first.map(String.init) ?? ""
156|2ae14f|        guard let colonIndex = firstPair.firstIndex(of: ":") else { return nil }
157|adc83b|
158|90fe28|        let keyExpr = String(firstPair[..<colonIndex]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
159|c8c196|        let valueExpr = String(firstPair[firstPair.index(after: colonIndex)...]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
160|adc83b|
161|28ea5b|        let keyType = inferSwiftType(from: keyExpr) ?? "AnyHashable"
162|eb3fdd|        let valueType = inferSwiftType(from: valueExpr) ?? "Any"
163|31573c|        return "[\(keyType): \(valueType)]"
164|27e597|    }
165|adc83b|
166|e21b8f|    // MARK: - Regex helpers
167|adc83b|
168|3efaff|    private func matches(_ text: String, pattern: String) -> Bool {
169|695372|        (try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []))?.firstMatch(
170|7697e1|            in: text,
171|11ba8c|            options: [],
172|264c2c|            range: NSRange(location: 0, length: (text as NSString).length)
173|d36f78|        ) != nil
174|27e597|    }
175|adc83b|
176|133a2e|    private func firstRegexGroup(_ text: String, pattern: String) -> String? {
177|473ca5|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return nil }
178|c60005|        let ns = text as NSString
179|05fef3|        let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
180|090ffd|        guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: text, options: [], range: range), match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return nil }
181|5ad252|        let r = match.range(at: 1)
182|8bd644|        guard r.location != NSNotFound else { return nil }
183|2550a5|        return ns.substring(with: r)
184|27e597|    }

226|886d26|    /// Sets up the Combine pipeline with debounce and throttle operators.
227|7cfeb1|    /// 
228|2302ea|    /// Pipeline flow:
229|fcd00b|    /// 1. typingSubject receives events
230|a7ce76|    /// 2. debounce(0.3s): Wait 300ms after user stops typing
231|a5971a|    /// 3. throttle(2.0s): Max 1 event per 2 seconds (latest=true for responsive updates)
232|c17292|    /// 4. removeDuplicates: Filter identical events
233|627455|    /// 5. filter: Remove empty/unworthy contexts
234|6f85e6|    /// 6. flatMap: Execute async fetch with cancellation support
235|2181d5|    private func setupSuggestionPipeline() {
236|ca13c2|        pipelineCancellable = typingSubject
237|0245e4|            // STEP 1: DEBOUNCE (300ms)
238|70cff9|            // Wait 300ms after user stops typing before processing
239|d9fce5|            // This prevents firing requests while user is actively typing
240|84dd17|            .debounce(for: .seconds(debounceInterval), scheduler: DispatchQueue.main)
241|3070d1|            
242|89fc5a|            // STEP 2: THROTTLE (2 seconds)
243|dbb01b|            // Maximum 1 request per 2 seconds
244|bce2c6|            // latest=true ensures we get the most recent event if multiple occur within throttle window
245|ecc467|            .throttle(for: .seconds(throttleInterval), scheduler: DispatchQueue.main, latest: true)
246|3070d1|            
247|844254|            // STEP 3: REMOVE DUPLICATES
248|413909|            // Filter out events with identical content and position
249|0a99da|            // This prevents duplicate API calls for the same context
250|cf49b3|            .removeDuplicates()
251|3070d1|            
252|202ed6|            // STEP 4: FILTER WORTHY CONTEXTS
253|a23af6|            // Only proceed if we have meaningful content to get suggestions for
254|845b1e|            .filter { [weak self] event in
255|06905f|                guard let self = self else { return false }
256|531968|                let context = self.extractContext(from: event.content, at: event.position)
257|cc659b|                return self.shouldRequestSuggestion(context: context)
258|a7dc16|            }
259|3070d1|            
260|339920|            // STEP 5: FLATMAP TO ASYNC FETCH
261|2bc815|            // Transform each event into a publisher that fetches suggestions
262|dbc22b|            // This creates a new async context that can be cancelled
263|11fcbf|            .flatMap { [weak self] event -> AnyPublisher<String?, Never> in
264|ec615d|                guard let self = self else {
265|6156c3|                    return Just(nil).eraseToAnyPublisher()
266|4e2d32|                }
267|216278|                
268|531968|                let context = self.extractContext(from: event.content, at: event.position)
269|6830af|                return self.createFetchPublisher(for: context)
270|a7dc16|            }
271|4de6c5|            // Ensure we receive on main thread for UI updates
272|a8597a|            .receive(on: DispatchQueue.main)
273|1051e2|            .sink { [weak self] suggestion in
274|518c9e|                self?.currentSuggestion = suggestion
275|02c979|                self?.isLoading = false
276|a7dc16|            }
277|27e597|    }

75|b92dfa|    func makeUIView(context: Context) -> TextView {
76|41741b|        let textView = TextView()
77|5c30bd|        textView.editorDelegate = context.coordinator
78|d6ed84|        
79|9a511b|        // Disable Runestone's built-in line numbers - we use custom LineNumbers gutter
80|a1c534|        textView.showLineNumbers = false
81|ebf726|        textView.lineSelectionDisplayType = .line
82|d6ed84|        
83|73d245|        // Configure line wrapping (from settings)
84|a2828f|        textView.isLineWrappingEnabled = wordWrapEnabled
85|d6ed84|        
86|c645f9|        // Configure editing
87|da0c96|        textView.isEditable = true
88|8e0a05|        textView.isSelectable = true
89|d6ed84|        
90|834cfd|        // Disable autocorrect/autocapitalize for code editing
91|9239ec|        textView.autocorrectionType = .no
92|be8b25|        textView.autocapitalizationType = .none
93|95e6b5|        textView.smartQuotesType = .no
94|8d5412|        textView.smartDashesType = .no
95|046505|        textView.smartInsertDeleteType = .no
96|3ed52b|        textView.spellCheckingType = .no
97|d6ed84|        
98|eda999|        // Configure keyboard
99|562515|        textView.keyboardType = .asciiCapable
100|1a155e|        textView.keyboardDismissMode = .interactive
101|d6ed84|        
102|5846ea|        // Content insets for padding
103|948867|        textView.textContainerInset = UIEdgeInsets(top: 8, left: 8, bottom: 8, right: 8)
104|d6ed84|        
105|6afd10|        // Set text with TreeSitter language support FIRST
106|1bdc19|        if let language = getTreeSitterLanguage(for: filename) {
107|e862fa|            let state = TextViewState(text: text, language: language)
108|aaf1be|            textView.setState(state)
109|b31999|        } else {
110|bf2c47|            // No language support - fallback to plain text
111|bf1757|            textView.text = text
112|5f3077|        }
113|d6ed84|        
114|359325|        // Set theme AFTER setState to ensure it takes effect
115|86633d|        // setState may reset internal rendering state, so theme must come after
116|3ea396|        textView.theme = makeRunestoneTheme()
117|e5b95a|        textView.backgroundColor = UIColor(ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme.editorBackground)
118|d6ed84|        
119|dafec7|        // Store reference for coordinator
120|33bdd5|        context.coordinator.textView = textView
121|d6ed84|        
122|94dfef|        // Initial line count
123|0706d6|        DispatchQueue.main.async {
124|61f4f4|            self.totalLines = self.countLines(in: text)
125|5f3077|        }
126|d6ed84|        
127|36e727|        return textView
128|27e597|    }
129|b4687f|    
130|2b113b|    func updateUIView(_ textView: TextView, context: Context) {
131|6bce46|        // Update coordinator's parent reference for current bindings
132|aa6fd6|        context.coordinator.parent = self
133|d6ed84|        
134|fa3f7d|        // Update theme if changed
135|462091|        let currentThemeId = ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme.id
136|173529|        if context.coordinator.lastThemeId != currentThemeId {
137|0ae3b4|            context.coordinator.lastThemeId = currentThemeId
138|cd161e|            textView.theme = makeRunestoneTheme()
139|2c8fb7|            textView.backgroundColor = UIColor(ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme.editorBackground)
140|5f3077|        }
141|d6ed84|        
142|c11584|        // Update font size if changed
143|0d6968|        if context.coordinator.lastFontSize != fontSize {
144|ad902d|            context.coordinator.lastFontSize = fontSize
145|cd161e|            textView.theme = makeRunestoneTheme()
146|5f3077|        }
147|d6ed84|        
148|783a16|        // Line numbers always disabled - using custom LineNumbers gutter
149|be78cc|        // Word wrap toggle still works
150|8e7477|        if textView.isLineWrappingEnabled != wordWrapEnabled {
151|ed0ffc|            textView.isLineWrappingEnabled = wordWrapEnabled
152|5f3077|        }
153|d6ed84|        
154|26756b|        // CRITICAL: Only call setState() when safe (not during active editing)
155|e2bb7b|        // Calling setState() during editing corrupts Runestone's lineManager
156|092fab|        // and causes crash at TextEditHelper.swift:27 (force unwrap on linePosition)
157|d6ed84|        
158|a43f62|        let isFileSwitching = context.coordinator.lastFilename != filename
159|d8aa68|        let currentText = textView.text
160|5cc09d|        let textChanged = currentText != text
161|dbea58|        let isActivelyEditing = textView.isFirstResponder
162|d6ed84|        
163|317e91|        if isFileSwitching {
164|97906a|            // User switched to a different file - safe to call setState()
165|6db873|            context.coordinator.lastFilename = filename
166|a9199d|            context.coordinator.hasBeenEdited = false
167|3070d1|            
168|66a1a1|            if let language = getTreeSitterLanguage(for: filename) {
169|d00b5e|                let state = TextViewState(text: text, language: language)
170|d69a75|                textView.setState(state)
171|f5a6eb|            } else {
172|8d685d|                textView.text = text
173|a7dc16|            }
174|3070d1|            
175|80f64f|            // CRITICAL: Re-apply theme AFTER setState - setState may reset rendering state
176|cd161e|            textView.theme = makeRunestoneTheme()
177|3070d1|            
178|00d273|            // Reset cursor to start for new file
179|f89f38|            textView.selectedRange = NSRange(location: 0, length: 0)
180|3070d1|            
181|a6439c|            // Update line count
182|ebb427|            DispatchQueue.main.async {
183|b26907|                self.totalLines = self.countLines(in: text)
184|a7dc16|            }
185|8bc7f3|        } else if textChanged && !context.coordinator.hasBeenEdited && !isActivelyEditing && !context.coordinator.isUpdatingFromTextView {
186|016671|            // Text changed externally (e.g., initial load, external modification)
187|51a126|            // Safe to update since user hasn't started editing yet
188|66a1a1|            if let language = getTreeSitterLanguage(for: filename) {
189|d00b5e|                let state = TextViewState(text: text, language: language)
190|d69a75|                textView.setState(state)
191|f5a6eb|            } else {
192|8d685d|                textView.text = text
193|a7dc16|            }
194|3070d1|            
195|80f64f|            // CRITICAL: Re-apply theme AFTER setState - setState may reset rendering state
196|cd161e|            textView.theme = makeRunestoneTheme()
197|3070d1|            
198|a6439c|            // Update line count
199|ebb427|            DispatchQueue.main.async {
200|b26907|                self.totalLines = self.countLines(in: text)
201|a7dc16|            }
202|5f3077|        }
203|57fb66|        // If user HAS edited OR is actively editing, DO NOTHING
204|a3857b|        // Let the user's edits remain - don't corrupt the lineManager
205|27e597|    }

209|9607ec|    private func makeRunestoneTheme() -> RunestoneEditorTheme {
210|71a1d4|        let appTheme = ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme
211|754683|        return RunestoneEditorTheme(
212|141233|            fontSize: fontSize,
213|6fed03|            backgroundColor: UIColor(appTheme.editorBackground),
214|3ff577|            textColor: UIColor(appTheme.editorForeground),
215|25c8f7|            gutterBackgroundColor: UIColor(appTheme.editorBackground),
216|f59562|            gutterHairlineColor: UIColor(appTheme.lineNumber).withAlphaComponent(0.3),
217|69b115|            lineNumberColor: UIColor(appTheme.lineNumber),
218|761e46|            selectedLineBackgroundColor: UIColor(appTheme.currentLineHighlight),
219|253711|            selectedLinesLineNumberColor: UIColor(appTheme.lineNumberActive),
220|c74ad9|            selectedLinesGutterBackgroundColor: UIColor(appTheme.currentLineHighlight),
221|2f7e95|            invisibleCharactersColor: UIColor(appTheme.editorForeground).withAlphaComponent(0.3),
222|d7f152|            pageGuideHairlineColor: UIColor(appTheme.editorForeground).withAlphaComponent(0.1),
223|811607|            pageGuideBackgroundColor: UIColor(appTheme.editorBackground),
224|f4a737|            markedTextBackgroundColor: UIColor(appTheme.selection).withAlphaComponent(0.5),
225|8585f5|            keywordColor: UIColor(appTheme.keyword),
226|b3e17b|            stringColor: UIColor(appTheme.string),
227|7ff3fd|            numberColor: UIColor(appTheme.number),
228|a05855|            commentColor: UIColor(appTheme.comment),
229|2801b0|            functionColor: UIColor(appTheme.function),
230|12e112|            typeColor: UIColor(appTheme.type),
231|684aec|            variableColor: UIColor(appTheme.variable)
232|3143a4|        )
233|27e597|    }

235|957540|    // MARK: - Language Mode Mapping
236|b4687f|    
237|70f3e8|    /// Gets the actual TreeSitter Language object for a given filename
238|f3a5e1|    /// Returns nil for plain text files (no syntax highlighting)
239|a4a35b|    private func getTreeSitterLanguage(for filename: String) -> Runestone.TreeSitterLanguage? {
240|98942b|        let ext = (filename as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
241|82335e|        let lastComponent = (filename as NSString).lastPathComponent.lowercased()
242|d6ed84|        
243|ab25ec|        // Special-case filenames without extensions
244|013551|        if lastComponent == "dockerfile" || lastComponent.hasPrefix("dockerfile.") {
245|274790|            return nil // Bash support not in package list yet
246|5f3077|        }
247|bf07fd|        if lastComponent == ".env" || lastComponent.hasPrefix(".env.") {
248|3e3e36|            return nil // Plain text
249|5f3077|        }
250|828d40|        if lastComponent == "makefile" || lastComponent == "gnumakefile" {
251|274790|            return nil // Bash support not in package list yet
252|5f3077|        }
253|4b7128|        if lastComponent == "podfile" || lastComponent == "gemfile" {
254|46c419|            return nil // Ruby support not in package list yet
255|5f3077|        }
256|0efae9|        if lastComponent == "package.json" || lastComponent == "tsconfig.json" {
257|4d9419|            return TreeSitterLanguage.json
258|5f3077|        }
259|d6ed84|        
260|f60e4e|        switch ext {
261|4c2810|        // Swift
262|1c8542|        case "swift":
263|376f7d|            return TreeSitterLanguage.swift
264|d6ed84|        
265|20fa65|        // JavaScript
266|cd5864|        case "js", "mjs", "cjs", "jsx":
267|fd14ee|            return TreeSitterLanguage.javaScript
268|d6ed84|        
269|194537|        // TypeScript - use JavaScript as fallback
270|a4d183|        case "ts", "mts", "cts", "tsx":
271|fd14ee|            return TreeSitterLanguage.javaScript
272|d6ed84|        
273|a87c1b|        // Python
274|85dfd3|        case "py", "pyw", "pyi":
275|4462da|            return TreeSitterLanguage.python
276|d6ed84|        
277|cd9e63|        // Go
278|ee50e6|        case "go":
279|44c0af|            return TreeSitterLanguage.go
280|d6ed84|        
281|fd611a|        // Rust
282|c28591|        case "rs":
283|9af65c|            return TreeSitterLanguage.rust
284|d6ed84|        
285|08c082|        // JSON
286|7aa37f|        case "json", "jsonc":
287|4d9419|            return TreeSitterLanguage.json
288|d6ed84|        
289|8aadd1|        // HTML
290|8f517a|        case "html", "htm", "xhtml":
291|d6b81f|            return TreeSitterLanguage.html
292|d6ed84|        
293|b0d395|        // CSS
294|c4efc3|        case "css", "scss":
295|27b343|            return TreeSitterLanguage.css
296|d6ed84|        
297|0fbfad|        // XML - use HTML as fallback
298|f580bd|        case "xml", "plist", "svg":
299|d6b81f|            return TreeSitterLanguage.html
300|d6ed84|        
301|c32a01|        // Default - no syntax highlighting
302|520b7d|        default:
303|1c8557|            return nil
304|5f3077|        }
305|27e597|    }

308|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
309|b4687f|    
310|6a2db5|    private func countLines(in text: String) -> Int {
311|ee3501|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return 1 }
312|c746a1|        var count = 1
313|48817a|        var index = text.startIndex
314|42136d|        while index < text.endIndex {
315|4396fc|            if text[index] == "\n" {
316|31d0c1|                count += 1
317|a7dc16|            }
318|3a0fcb|            index = text.index(after: index)
319|5f3077|        }
320|c7b6e6|        return count

237|70f3e8|    /// Gets the actual TreeSitter Language object for a given filename
238|f3a5e1|    /// Returns nil for plain text files (no syntax highlighting)
239|a4a35b|    private func getTreeSitterLanguage(for filename: String) -> Runestone.TreeSitterLanguage? {
240|98942b|        let ext = (filename as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
241|82335e|        let lastComponent = (filename as NSString).lastPathComponent.lowercased()
242|d6ed84|        
243|ab25ec|        // Special-case filenames without extensions
244|013551|        if lastComponent == "dockerfile" || lastComponent.hasPrefix("dockerfile.") {
245|274790|            return nil // Bash support not in package list yet
246|5f3077|        }
247|bf07fd|        if lastComponent == ".env" || lastComponent.hasPrefix(".env.") {
248|3e3e36|            return nil // Plain text
249|5f3077|        }
250|828d40|        if lastComponent == "makefile" || lastComponent == "gnumakefile" {
251|274790|            return nil // Bash support not in package list yet
252|5f3077|        }
253|4b7128|        if lastComponent == "podfile" || lastComponent == "gemfile" {
254|46c419|            return nil // Ruby support not in package list yet
255|5f3077|        }
256|0efae9|        if lastComponent == "package.json" || lastComponent == "tsconfig.json" {
257|4d9419|            return TreeSitterLanguage.json
258|5f3077|        }
259|d6ed84|        
260|f60e4e|        switch ext {
261|4c2810|        // Swift
262|1c8542|        case "swift":
263|376f7d|            return TreeSitterLanguage.swift
264|d6ed84|        
265|20fa65|        // JavaScript
266|cd5864|        case "js", "mjs", "cjs", "jsx":
267|fd14ee|            return TreeSitterLanguage.javaScript
268|d6ed84|        
269|194537|        // TypeScript - use JavaScript as fallback
270|a4d183|        case "ts", "mts", "cts", "tsx":
271|fd14ee|            return TreeSitterLanguage.javaScript
272|d6ed84|        
273|a87c1b|        // Python
274|85dfd3|        case "py", "pyw", "pyi":
275|4462da|            return TreeSitterLanguage.python
276|d6ed84|        
277|cd9e63|        // Go
278|ee50e6|        case "go":
279|44c0af|            return TreeSitterLanguage.go
280|d6ed84|        
281|fd611a|        // Rust
282|c28591|        case "rs":
283|9af65c|            return TreeSitterLanguage.rust
284|d6ed84|        
285|08c082|        // JSON
286|7aa37f|        case "json", "jsonc":
287|4d9419|            return TreeSitterLanguage.json
288|d6ed84|        
289|8aadd1|        // HTML
290|8f517a|        case "html", "htm", "xhtml":
291|d6b81f|            return TreeSitterLanguage.html
292|d6ed84|        
293|b0d395|        // CSS
294|c4efc3|        case "css", "scss":
295|27b343|            return TreeSitterLanguage.css
296|d6ed84|        
297|0fbfad|        // XML - use HTML as fallback
298|f580bd|        case "xml", "plist", "svg":
299|d6b81f|            return TreeSitterLanguage.html
300|d6ed84|        
301|c32a01|        // Default - no syntax highlighting
302|520b7d|        default:
303|1c8557|            return nil
304|5f3077|        }
305|27e597|    }

309|b4687f|    
310|6a2db5|    private func countLines(in text: String) -> Int {
311|ee3501|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return 1 }
312|c746a1|        var count = 1
313|48817a|        var index = text.startIndex
314|42136d|        while index < text.endIndex {
315|4396fc|            if text[index] == "\n" {
316|31d0c1|                count += 1
317|a7dc16|            }
318|3a0fcb|            index = text.index(after: index)
319|5f3077|        }
320|c7b6e6|        return count
321|27e597|    }

336|d6ed84|

340|d6ed84|
