356|02717e|            // Mark that user has edited - blocks setState() calls until file switch
357|f51822|            hasBeenEdited = true

361|3070d1|

364|150252|                guard let self = self else { return }
365|84d674|                self.isUpdatingFromTextView = true
366|0ae33b|                defer { self.isUpdatingFromTextView = false }
367|216278|

376|3070d1|

379|c3b6ab|            DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + debounceInterval, execute: workItem)
380|5f3077|        }
381|d6ed84|

235|957540|    // MARK: - Language Mode Mapping
236|b4687f|    
237|70f3e8|    /// Gets the actual TreeSitter Language object for a given filename
238|f3a5e1|    /// Returns nil for plain text files (no syntax highlighting)
239|a4a35b|    private func getTreeSitterLanguage(for filename: String) -> Runestone.TreeSitterLanguage? {
240|98942b|        let ext = (filename as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
241|82335e|        let lastComponent = (filename as NSString).lastPathComponent.lowercased()
242|d6ed84|        
243|ab25ec|        // Special-case filenames without extensions
244|013551|        if lastComponent == "dockerfile" || lastComponent.hasPrefix("dockerfile.") {
245|274790|            return nil // Bash support not in package list yet
246|5f3077|        }
247|bf07fd|        if lastComponent == ".env" || lastComponent.hasPrefix(".env.") {
248|3e3e36|            return nil // Plain text
249|5f3077|        }
250|828d40|        if lastComponent == "makefile" || lastComponent == "gnumakefile" {
251|274790|            return nil // Bash support not in package list yet
252|5f3077|        }
253|4b7128|        if lastComponent == "podfile" || lastComponent == "gemfile" {
254|46c419|            return nil // Ruby support not in package list yet
255|5f3077|        }
256|0efae9|        if lastComponent == "package.json" || lastComponent == "tsconfig.json" {
257|4d9419|            return TreeSitterLanguage.json
258|5f3077|        }
259|d6ed84|        
260|f60e4e|        switch ext {
261|4c2810|        // Swift
262|1c8542|        case "swift":
263|376f7d|            return TreeSitterLanguage.swift
264|d6ed84|        
265|20fa65|        // JavaScript
266|cd5864|        case "js", "mjs", "cjs", "jsx":
267|fd14ee|            return TreeSitterLanguage.javaScript
268|d6ed84|        
269|194537|        // TypeScript - use JavaScript as fallback
270|a4d183|        case "ts", "mts", "cts", "tsx":
271|fd14ee|            return TreeSitterLanguage.javaScript
272|d6ed84|        
273|a87c1b|        // Python
274|85dfd3|        case "py", "pyw", "pyi":
275|4462da|            return TreeSitterLanguage.python
276|d6ed84|        
277|cd9e63|        // Go
278|ee50e6|        case "go":
279|44c0af|            return TreeSitterLanguage.go
280|d6ed84|        
281|fd611a|        // Rust
282|c28591|        case "rs":
283|9af65c|            return TreeSitterLanguage.rust
284|d6ed84|        
285|08c082|        // JSON
286|7aa37f|        case "json", "jsonc":
287|4d9419|            return TreeSitterLanguage.json
288|d6ed84|        
289|8aadd1|        // HTML
290|8f517a|        case "html", "htm", "xhtml":
291|d6b81f|            return TreeSitterLanguage.html
292|d6ed84|        
293|b0d395|        // CSS
294|c4efc3|        case "css", "scss":
295|27b343|            return TreeSitterLanguage.css
296|d6ed84|        
297|0fbfad|        // XML - use HTML as fallback
298|f580bd|        case "xml", "plist", "svg":
299|d6b81f|            return TreeSitterLanguage.html
300|d6ed84|        
301|c32a01|        // Default - no syntax highlighting
302|520b7d|        default:
303|1c8557|            return nil
304|5f3077|        }
305|27e597|    }

308|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
309|b4687f|    
310|6a2db5|    private func countLines(in text: String) -> Int {
311|ee3501|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return 1 }
312|c746a1|        var count = 1
313|48817a|        var index = text.startIndex
314|42136d|        while index < text.endIndex {
315|4396fc|            if text[index] == "\n" {
316|31d0c1|                count += 1
317|a7dc16|            }
318|3a0fcb|            index = text.index(after: index)
319|5f3077|        }
320|c7b6e6|        return count
321|27e597|    }

324|b4687f|    
325|57fd33|    class Coordinator: NSObject, TextViewDelegate {
326|fe867f|        var parent: RunestoneEditorView
327|0bde9e|        weak var textView: TextView?
328|e0c082|        var isUpdatingFromTextView = false
329|d5e6db|        var lastFontSize: CGFloat = 14.0
330|df72ce|        var lastThemeId: String = ""
331|e181a1|        var currentLanguage: Language?
332|d6ed84|        
333|b93091|        // Track file identity to know when to call setState()
334|244df6|        var lastFilename: String = ""
335|82a9dc|        var hasBeenEdited: Bool = false
336|d6ed84|        
337|a814d3|        // Debounced text sync to avoid SwiftUI re-renders on every keystroke
338|aae740|        private var textSyncWorkItem: DispatchWorkItem?
339|8fda30|        private let debounceInterval: TimeInterval = 0.5 // 500ms
340|d6ed84|        
341|043ea2|        init(_ parent: RunestoneEditorView) {
342|12d237|            self.parent = parent
343|ffb0bd|            self.lastFontSize = parent.fontSize
344|3fc189|            self.lastThemeId = ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme.id
345|c8ef01|            self.lastFilename = parent.filename
346|5f3077|        }
347|d6ed84|        
348|788eb1|        deinit {
349|e504ad|            // Cancel any pending debounced updates
350|bc1cc6|            textSyncWorkItem?.cancel()
351|5f3077|        }
352|d6ed84|        
353|cc0795|        // MARK: - TextViewDelegate
354|d6ed84|        
355|b75d27|        func textViewDidChange(_ textView: TextView) {
356|02717e|            // Mark that user has edited - blocks setState() calls until file switch
357|f51822|            hasBeenEdited = true
358|3070d1|            
359|d2cd8b|            // Cancel any pending debounced update
360|bc1cc6|            textSyncWorkItem?.cancel()
361|3070d1|            
362|6966df|            // Create new debounced work item
363|36310e|            let workItem = DispatchWorkItem { [weak self] in
364|150252|                guard let self = self else { return }
365|84d674|                self.isUpdatingFromTextView = true
366|0ae33b|                defer { self.isUpdatingFromTextView = false }
367|216278|                
368|24c8b7|                // Update text binding (debounced - only after typing stops)
369|c75e92|                self.parent.text = textView.text
370|216278|                
371|416a60|                // Update line count
372|f143b8|                DispatchQueue.main.async {
373|d865ea|                    self.parent.totalLines = self.parent.countLines(in: textView.text)
374|4e2d32|                }
375|a7dc16|            }
376|3070d1|            
377|eaaa24|            // Schedule the update after debounce interval
378|587c05|            textSyncWorkItem = workItem
379|c3b6ab|            DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + debounceInterval, execute: workItem)
380|5f3077|        }
381|d6ed84|        
382|6a67c9|        /// Immediately sync text to SwiftUI binding (call on save/tab-switch)
383|a61f5c|        func syncTextImmediately() {
384|d2cd8b|            // Cancel any pending debounced update
385|bc1cc6|            textSyncWorkItem?.cancel()
386|3070d1|            
387|078830|            guard let textView = textView else { return }
388|3070d1|            
389|3f491a|            isUpdatingFromTextView = true
390|5485b2|            defer { isUpdatingFromTextView = false }
391|3070d1|            
392|6db6b0|            // Immediate sync
393|f9041f|            parent.text = textView.text
394|9b320f|            parent.totalLines = parent.countLines(in: textView.text)
395|5f3077|        }
396|d6ed84|        
397|49059d|        func textViewDidChangeSelection(_ textView: TextView) {
398|b59fde|            updateCursorPosition(in: textView)
399|5f3077|        }
400|d6ed84|        
401|4eb4ea|        func textViewDidBeginEditing(_ textView: TextView) {
402|bb2790|            // Could be used for focus handling
403|5f3077|        }
404|d6ed84|        
405|40d063|        func textViewDidEndEditing(_ textView: TextView) {
406|bb2790|            // Could be used for focus handling
407|5f3077|        }
408|d6ed84|        
409|f6a64f|        func textView(_ textView: TextView, shouldChangeTextIn range: NSRange, replacementText text: String) -> Bool {
410|3f3964|            // Handle Tab key for autocomplete acceptance
411|6688de|            if text == "\t" {
412|f9c439|                if let onAccept = parent.onAcceptAutocomplete, onAccept() {
413|df59cf|                    return false
414|4e2d32|                }
415|a7dc16|            }
416|3070d1|            
417|cc3aa6|            // Handle Escape key for autocomplete dismissal
418|ce7885|            // Note: Escape key events are typically handled via key commands, not here
419|3070d1|            
420|40cfc4|            return true

430|f9574f|        // MARK: - Cursor Position Calculation
431|d6ed84|        
432|638123|        private func updateCursorPosition(in textView: TextView) {
433|e844dd|            let selectedRange = textView.selectedRange
434|0c3128|            let text = textView.text as NSString
435|c0763f|            let cursorLocation = selectedRange.location
436|3070d1|            
437|3c0f5f|            // Calculate line and column from cursor location
438|2bf772|            var lineNumber = 1
439|b2dc74|            var columnNumber = 1
440|895788|            var currentLineStart = 0
441|3070d1|            
442|30ee03|            for i in 0..<min(cursorLocation, text.length) {
443|76817f|                if text.character(at: i) == UInt16(UnicodeScalar("\n").value) {
444|4ae0f3|                    lineNumber += 1
445|1230ab|                    currentLineStart = i + 1
446|4e2d32|                }
447|a7dc16|            }
448|3070d1|            
449|fe9f83|            // Column is the offset from the start of the current line
450|2ea6e9|            columnNumber = cursorLocation - currentLineStart + 1
451|3070d1|            
452|13f4e9|            // Update bindings on main thread to avoid SwiftUI state update warnings
453|ebb427|            DispatchQueue.main.async {
454|62efc4|                self.parent.cursorIndex = cursorLocation
455|29327f|                self.parent.currentLineNumber = lineNumber
456|975d29|                self.parent.currentColumn = columnNumber
457|a7dc16|            }
458|5f3077|        }
459|27e597|    }

591|77216f|    func textColor(for rawHighlightName: String) -> UIColor? {
592|364fdf|        // Map TreeSitter highlight names to colors
593|077102|        // See: https://tree-sitter.github.io/tree-sitter/syntax-highlighting#highlights
594|a3c6a6|        let highlightName = rawHighlightName.lowercased()
595|d6ed84|        
596|3e8301|        // Debug: Log ALL highlight names to console (ENABLED FOR DEBUGGING)
597|1aa7f0|        print("🎨 HIGHLIGHT: '\(rawHighlightName)' -> ", terminator: "")
598|d6ed84|        
599|5f2431|        // Keywords
600|347daa|        if highlightName.contains("keyword") {
601|e0cdb7|            print("keyword (blue)")
602|11656d|            return _keywordColor
603|5f3077|        }
604|d6ed84|        
605|c13ace|        // JSON/Object keys - MUST return color for specific patterns
606|164d0a|        // TreeSitter JSON emits BOTH "string.special.key" AND "string" for keys
607|63f969|        // We handle specific patterns first, then skip generic "string" to avoid overwrite
608|929452|        if highlightName.hasPrefix("string.special") ||
609|7d9926|           highlightName.contains("label") ||
610|81c371|           highlightName.contains("property.definition") {
611|7612b6|            print("key/label (light blue)")
612|5086b7|            return _variableColor  // Light blue #9CDCFE for keys
613|5f3077|        }
614|d6ed84|        
615|5fe933|        // Strings - but NOT if it's JUST "string" (let specific matches win)
616|dcb001|        // Only color strings that are clearly values, not potential keys
617|ab3d14|        if highlightName.contains("string") {
618|5655ac|            print("string (orange)")
619|f09755|            return _stringColor  // Orange #CE9178 for string values
620|5f3077|        }
621|d6ed84|        
622|f425cd|        // Numbers and constants
623|a2036f|        if highlightName.contains("number") || highlightName == "constant.numeric" {
624|57bea5|            print("number (green)")
625|da9aee|            return _numberColor
626|5f3077|        }
627|d6ed84|        
628|185d89|        // Comments
629|f4b237|        if highlightName.contains("comment") {
630|e46058|            return _commentColor
631|5f3077|        }
632|d6ed84|        
633|4d76db|        // Functions and methods
634|915dec|        if highlightName.contains("function") || highlightName.contains("method") {
635|69dae5|            return _functionColor
636|5f3077|        }
637|d6ed84|        
638|5853d5|        // Types, classes, structs
639|a68e63|        if highlightName.contains("type") || highlightName.contains("class") ||
640|fe7d45|           highlightName.contains("struct") || highlightName.contains("interface") ||
641|7850d5|           highlightName.contains("enum") {
642|079364|            return _typeColor
643|5f3077|        }
644|d6ed84|        
645|100acb|        // Variables, parameters, properties
646|87a47d|        if highlightName.contains("variable") || highlightName.contains("parameter") ||
647|6198a9|           highlightName.contains("property") || highlightName.contains("field") {
648|0e23b9|            return _variableColor
649|5f3077|        }
650|d6ed84|        
651|f1a54a|        // Constants and booleans - use keyword color
652|cc358f|        if highlightName.contains("constant") || highlightName.contains("boolean") {
653|11656d|            return _keywordColor
654|5f3077|        }
655|d6ed84|        
656|b158fb|        // Operators - use keyword color
657|1a986d|        if highlightName.contains("operator") {
658|11656d|            return _keywordColor
659|5f3077|        }
660|d6ed84|        
661|8737fd|        // Namespaces and modules - use type color
662|d04ebe|        if highlightName.contains("namespace") || highlightName.contains("module") {
663|079364|            return _typeColor
664|5f3077|        }
665|d6ed84|        
666|d204ef|        // Tags (HTML, XML) - use type color
667|e21ab6|        if highlightName.contains("tag") {
668|079364|            return _typeColor
669|5f3077|        }
670|d6ed84|        
671|2abb6b|        // Attributes - use variable color
672|91f255|        if highlightName.contains("attribute") {
673|0e23b9|            return _variableColor
674|5f3077|        }
675|d6ed84|        
676|bb1e1f|        // Spell checking highlights - ignore (return nil to use default)
677|1dc697|        if highlightName.contains("spell") {
678|1c8557|            return nil
679|5f3077|        }
680|d6ed84|        
681|3d22f9|        // Include/import statements - use keyword color
682|fd8f58|        if highlightName.contains("include") {
683|11656d|            return _keywordColor
684|5f3077|        }
685|d6ed84|        
686|c1e1a1|        // Default: use standard text color
687|e35567|        print("nil (default)")
688|c2ae65|        return nil
689|27e597|    }

691|666dc2|    func fontTraits(for rawHighlightName: String) -> FontTraits {
692|a3c6a6|        let highlightName = rawHighlightName.lowercased()
693|d6ed84|

130|2b113b|    func updateUIView(_ textView: TextView, context: Context) {
131|6bce46|        // Update coordinator's parent reference for current bindings
132|aa6fd6|        context.coordinator.parent = self
133|d6ed84|

137|0ae3b4|            context.coordinator.lastThemeId = currentThemeId
138|cd161e|            textView.theme = makeRunestoneTheme()

140|5f3077|        }
141|d6ed84|        
142|c11584|        // Update font size if changed
143|0d6968|        if context.coordinator.lastFontSize != fontSize {

152|5f3077|        }
153|d6ed84|        
154|26756b|        // CRITICAL: Only call setState() when safe (not during active editing)

156|092fab|        // and causes crash at TextEditHelper.swift:27 (force unwrap on linePosition)
157|d6ed84|        
158|a43f62|        let isFileSwitching = context.coordinator.lastFilename != filename
159|d8aa68|        let currentText = textView.text
160|5cc09d|        let textChanged = currentText != text
161|dbea58|        let isActivelyEditing = textView.isFirstResponder
162|d6ed84|        
163|317e91|        if isFileSwitching {
164|97906a|            // User switched to a different file - safe to call setState()
165|6db873|            context.coordinator.lastFilename = filename
166|a9199d|            context.coordinator.hasBeenEdited = false
167|3070d1|            
168|66a1a1|            if let language = getTreeSitterLanguage(for: filename) {
169|d00b5e|                let state = TextViewState(text: text, language: language)

171|f5a6eb|            } else {
172|8d685d|                textView.text = text
173|a7dc16|            }
174|3070d1|            
175|80f64f|            // CRITICAL: Re-apply theme AFTER setState - setState may reset rendering state
176|cd161e|            textView.theme = makeRunestoneTheme()
177|3070d1|            
178|00d273|            // Reset cursor to start for new file
179|f89f38|            textView.selectedRange = NSRange(location: 0, length: 0)
180|3070d1|            
181|a6439c|            // Update line count
182|ebb427|            DispatchQueue.main.async {
183|b26907|                self.totalLines = self.countLines(in: text)
184|a7dc16|            }
185|8bc7f3|        } else if textChanged && !context.coordinator.hasBeenEdited && !isActivelyEditing && !context.coordinator.isUpdatingFromTextView {
186|016671|            // Text changed externally (e.g., initial load, external modification)
187|51a126|            // Safe to update since user hasn't started editing yet
188|66a1a1|            if let language = getTreeSitterLanguage(for: filename) {
189|d00b5e|                let state = TextViewState(text: text, language: language)
190|d69a75|                textView.setState(state)
191|f5a6eb|            } else {
192|8d685d|                textView.text = text

195|80f64f|            // CRITICAL: Re-apply theme AFTER setState - setState may reset rendering state

223|811607|            pageGuideBackgroundColor: UIColor(appTheme.editorBackground),

235|957540|    // MARK: - Language Mode Mapping
236|b4687f|    
237|70f3e8|    /// Gets the actual TreeSitter Language object for a given filename
238|f3a5e1|    /// Returns nil for plain text files (no syntax highlighting)
239|a4a35b|    private func getTreeSitterLanguage(for filename: String) -> Runestone.TreeSitterLanguage? {
240|98942b|        let ext = (filename as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
241|82335e|        let lastComponent = (filename as NSString).lastPathComponent.lowercased()
242|d6ed84|        
243|ab25ec|        // Special-case filenames without extensions
244|013551|        if lastComponent == "dockerfile" || lastComponent.hasPrefix("dockerfile.") {
245|274790|            return nil // Bash support not in package list yet
246|5f3077|        }
247|bf07fd|        if lastComponent == ".env" || lastComponent.hasPrefix(".env.") {
248|3e3e36|            return nil // Plain text
249|5f3077|        }
250|828d40|        if lastComponent == "makefile" || lastComponent == "gnumakefile" {
251|274790|            return nil // Bash support not in package list yet
252|5f3077|        }
253|4b7128|        if lastComponent == "podfile" || lastComponent == "gemfile" {
254|46c419|            return nil // Ruby support not in package list yet
255|5f3077|        }
256|0efae9|        if lastComponent == "package.json" || lastComponent == "tsconfig.json" {
257|4d9419|            return TreeSitterLanguage.json
258|5f3077|        }
259|d6ed84|        
260|f60e4e|        switch ext {
261|4c2810|        // Swift
262|1c8542|        case "swift":
263|376f7d|            return TreeSitterLanguage.swift
264|d6ed84|        
265|20fa65|        // JavaScript
266|cd5864|        case "js", "mjs", "cjs", "jsx":
267|fd14ee|            return TreeSitterLanguage.javaScript
268|d6ed84|        
269|194537|        // TypeScript - use JavaScript as fallback
270|a4d183|        case "ts", "mts", "cts", "tsx":
271|fd14ee|            return TreeSitterLanguage.javaScript
272|d6ed84|        
273|a87c1b|        // Python
274|85dfd3|        case "py", "pyw", "pyi":
275|4462da|            return TreeSitterLanguage.python
276|d6ed84|        
277|cd9e63|        // Go
278|ee50e6|        case "go":
279|44c0af|            return TreeSitterLanguage.go
280|d6ed84|        
281|fd611a|        // Rust
282|c28591|        case "rs":
283|9af65c|            return TreeSitterLanguage.rust
284|d6ed84|        
285|08c082|        // JSON
286|7aa37f|        case "json", "jsonc":
287|4d9419|            return TreeSitterLanguage.json
288|d6ed84|        
289|8aadd1|        // HTML
290|8f517a|        case "html", "htm", "xhtml":
291|d6b81f|            return TreeSitterLanguage.html
292|d6ed84|        
293|b0d395|        // CSS
294|c4efc3|        case "css", "scss":
295|27b343|            return TreeSitterLanguage.css
296|d6ed84|        
297|0fbfad|        // XML - use HTML as fallback
298|f580bd|        case "xml", "plist", "svg":
299|d6b81f|            return TreeSitterLanguage.html
300|d6ed84|        
301|c32a01|        // Default - no syntax highlighting
302|520b7d|        default:
303|1c8557|            return nil
304|5f3077|        }
305|27e597|    }

308|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
309|b4687f|    
310|6a2db5|    private func countLines(in text: String) -> Int {
311|ee3501|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return 1 }
312|c746a1|        var count = 1
313|48817a|        var index = text.startIndex
314|42136d|        while index < text.endIndex {
315|4396fc|            if text[index] == "\n" {
316|31d0c1|                count += 1
317|a7dc16|            }
318|3a0fcb|            index = text.index(after: index)
319|5f3077|        }
320|c7b6e6|        return count
321|27e597|    }

340|d6ed84|

342|12d237|            self.parent = parent

355|b75d27|        func textViewDidChange(_ textView: TextView) {
356|02717e|            // Mark that user has edited - blocks setState() calls until file switch
357|f51822|            hasBeenEdited = true
358|3070d1|            
359|d2cd8b|            // Cancel any pending debounced update

361|3070d1|            
362|6966df|            // Create new debounced work item
363|36310e|            let workItem = DispatchWorkItem { [weak self] in
364|150252|                guard let self = self else { return }
365|84d674|                self.isUpdatingFromTextView = true
366|0ae33b|                defer { self.isUpdatingFromTextView = false }
367|216278|                
368|24c8b7|                // Update text binding (debounced - only after typing stops)

370|216278|

373|d865ea|                    self.parent.totalLines = self.parent.countLines(in: textView.text)
374|4e2d32|                }
375|a7dc16|            }
376|3070d1|            
377|eaaa24|            // Schedule the update after debounce interval
378|587c05|            textSyncWorkItem = workItem
379|c3b6ab|            DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + debounceInterval, execute: workItem)
380|5f3077|        }
381|d6ed84|        
382|6a67c9|        /// Immediately sync text to SwiftUI binding (call on save/tab-switch)
383|a61f5c|        func syncTextImmediately() {
384|d2cd8b|            // Cancel any pending debounced update

386|3070d1|            
387|078830|            guard let textView = textView else { return }
388|3070d1|            
389|3f491a|            isUpdatingFromTextView = true
390|5485b2|            defer { isUpdatingFromTextView = false }
391|3070d1|            
392|6db6b0|            // Immediate sync
393|f9041f|            parent.text = textView.text
394|9b320f|            parent.totalLines = parent.countLines(in: textView.text)
395|5f3077|        }

220|7dcb1c|    func updateUIView(_ textView: UITextView, context: Context) {
221|855109|        // CRITICAL: Update coordinator's parent reference to current struct
222|333ede|        // SwiftUI creates new struct instances on each update, so this keeps
223|620e32|        // coordinator in sync with current bindings and properties
224|aa6fd6|        context.coordinator.parent = self
225|d6ed84|        
226|0a58ec|        // CRITICAL FIX: Apply initial highlighting FIRST on the very first updateUIView call
227|211a1a|        // This fixes the bug where syntax highlighting only appears after typing.
228|815fc1|        // makeUIView applies it, but the view may not be fully in hierarchy yet,
229|ab2ed7|        // causing the attributed text to be lost. This ensures it's applied reliably.
230|d721d6|        if !context.coordinator.hasAppliedInitialHighlighting && !textView.text.isEmpty {
231|140558|            context.coordinator.applySyntaxHighlighting(to: textView)
232|4dd2eb|            context.coordinator.hasAppliedInitialHighlighting = true
233|5f3077|        }
234|d6ed84|        
235|31e4e9|        // Update colors when theme changes
236|5ee36b|        // NOTE: Only set backgroundColor and tintColor here. Do NOT set textColor
237|d2a31c|        // as it interferes with attributedText syntax highlighting colors.
238|2ba8b3|        // The foreground color is handled entirely by the attributedText.
239|e5b95a|        textView.backgroundColor = UIColor(ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme.editorBackground)
240|0c4521|        textView.tintColor = UIColor(ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme.cursor)
241|d6ed84|        
242|330f1a|        if let editorView = textView as? EditorTextView {
243|397219|            editorView.updateThemeColors(theme: ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme)
244|5f3077|        }
245|d6ed84|        
246|c506e2|        // Update font size if changed (using explicit fontSize parameter for proper SwiftUI updates)
247|1e3b94|        if let currentFont = textView.font, currentFont.pointSize != fontSize {
248|e844dd|            let selectedRange = textView.selectedRange
249|441e85|            textView.font = UIFont.monospacedSystemFont(ofSize: fontSize, weight: .regular)
250|140558|            context.coordinator.applySyntaxHighlighting(to: textView)
251|335b1a|            textView.selectedRange = selectedRange
252|3070d1|            
253|53ed35|            // Update line height
254|f4daab|            if let font = textView.font {
255|f143b8|                DispatchQueue.main.async {
256|6dfb70|                    self.lineHeight = font.lineHeight
257|4e2d32|                }
258|a7dc16|            }
259|5f3077|        }
260|d6ed84|        
261|d764b8|        // Update text if changed externally
262|c4b3de|        if textView.text != text {
263|e844dd|            let selectedRange = textView.selectedRange
264|bf1757|            textView.text = text
265|140558|            context.coordinator.applySyntaxHighlighting(to: textView)
266|4dd2eb|            context.coordinator.hasAppliedInitialHighlighting = true
267|335b1a|            textView.selectedRange = selectedRange
268|cbbdc8|        } else if context.coordinator.lastThemeId != ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme.id {
269|921fd1|            // Re-apply highlighting if theme changed
270|140558|            context.coordinator.applySyntaxHighlighting(to: textView)
271|5f3077|        }
272|d6ed84|        
273|98290a|        // Handle minimap scrolling - but ONLY if user is NOT actively scrolling
274|5fbd94|        // This prevents the editor from fighting against user scroll due to async binding lag
275|935237|        if scrollPosition != context.coordinator.lastKnownScrollPosition && scrollPosition >= 0 && !context.coordinator.isUserScrolling {
276|7582fa|            // Update lastKnownScrollPosition FIRST to prevent race condition
277|2bbfef|            // where user scroll gets overridden by stale binding value
278|76f423|            context.coordinator.lastKnownScrollPosition = scrollPosition
279|8543a8|            context.coordinator.scrollToLine(scrollPosition, in: textView)
280|5f3077|        }
281|adc83b|
282|649b47|        // Handle line selection requests (e.g. tapping line numbers)
283|89e0a7|        if let requested = requestedLineSelection,
284|16d365|           requested != context.coordinator.lastRequestedLineSelection {
285|b908db|            context.coordinator.lastRequestedLineSelection = requested
286|161f74|            context.coordinator.scrollToAndSelectLine(requested, in: textView)
287|8b95ef|            // Defer @Binding update to avoid "Publishing changes from within view updates"
288|ebb427|            DispatchQueue.main.async {
289|2fa7d1|                self.requestedLineSelection = nil
290|a7dc16|            }
291|5f3077|        }
292|adc83b|

294|503648|        if let requested = requestedCursorIndex,
295|9a2334|           requested != context.coordinator.lastRequestedCursorIndex {
296|89b5a6|            context.coordinator.lastRequestedCursorIndex = requested
297|40dc8c|            // Use UTF-16 count for NSRange compatibility

299|97ec0c|            let safeIndex = max(0, min(requested, textLength))

301|3070d1|

224|7d7b95|    private struct CompletionContext {
225|0dee4e|        let prefix: String

228|79772b|        let memberBase: String?

230|adc83b|
231|f6601a|    private func completionContext(in text: String, cursorPosition: Int) -> CompletionContext? {
232|4c2df9|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return nil }
233|d6ed84|        
234|42915b|        // Safety check: ensure cursorPosition is within bounds
235|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))
236|1fae78|        let cursorIndex = text.index(text.startIndex, offsetBy: safeCursor)
237|adc83b|
238|5aebf3|        // Find start of current identifier (letters/digits/_).
239|39f169|        var start = cursorIndex
240|26ebb3|        while start > text.startIndex {
241|c5c76e|            let prev = text.index(before: start)
242|9f8a31|            if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
243|1929f8|                start = prev
244|f5a6eb|            } else {
245|74cfd8|                break
246|a7dc16|            }
247|5f3077|        }
248|adc83b|
249|bf292f|        let prefix = String(text[start..<cursorIndex])
250|adc83b|
251|824562|        // Member completion if immediately preceded by '.'
252|e374b4|        var isMember = false
253|e47c72|        var memberBase: String? = nil
254|adc83b|
255|0c2c38|        if start > text.startIndex {
256|2aa058|            let dotIndex = text.index(before: start)
257|88bd65|            if text[dotIndex] == "." {
258|ca8397|                isMember = true
259|adc83b|
260|6f6689|                // Parse identifier before '.'
261|91f615|                var baseEnd = dotIndex
262|521a36|                var baseStart = baseEnd

266|fbabfa|                        baseStart = prev
267|540066|                    } else {
268|28a64b|                        break
269|c9717a|                    }
270|4e2d32|                }
271|f96abf|                let base = String(text[baseStart..<baseEnd])
272|ce472b|                if !base.isEmpty {

274|4e2d32|                }
275|a7dc16|            }
276|5f3077|        }

284|818e4b|    private func isIdentifierChar(_ c: Character) -> Bool {
285|c233b9|        // Swift identifiers are more complex, but this is enough for basic autocomplete.
286|a164d4|        return c.isLetter || c.isNumber || c == "_"
287|27e597|    }
288|adc83b|

290|cf1cb2|        // Basic heuristic: only match known stdlib types by exact name.
291|622249|        if let members = memberCompletions[base] { return members }
292|b72a10|        return []
293|27e597|    }

295|6ba6d8|    private func extractSymbols(from text: String) -> [String] {
296|1098cf|        // Very lightweight symbol extraction: looks for common declarations.
297|141450|        // Intentionally best-effort; keeps FEAT-046 self-contained.
298|f746d2|        var results = Set<String>()
299|adc83b|
300|f97d0d|        func addMatches(pattern: String) {
301|ca0afa|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return }
302|6c811f|            let ns = text as NSString
303|b25f5b|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
304|d25847|            regex.enumerateMatches(in: text, options: [], range: range) { match, _, _ in
305|14f5aa|                guard let match, match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return }
306|345d9a|                let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
307|de56e8|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { return }
308|8989a1|                let name = ns.substring(with: nameRange)
309|66b469|                if !name.isEmpty { results.insert(name) }
310|a7dc16|            }
311|5f3077|        }
312|adc83b|
313|a1c515|        // func Foo
314|cd4071|        addMatches(pattern: "\\bfunc\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
315|5eaefb|        // class/struct/enum/protocol/typealias Foo
316|685691|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:class|struct|enum|protocol|typealias)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
317|3764b8|        // let/var foo (captures first name before : = , )
318|bbf05c|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)(?=\\s*[:=,])")
319|adc83b|
320|01a90c|        return results.sorted { $0.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1) == .orderedAscending }
321|27e597|    }
322|adc83b|
323|1470f2|    private func mergeAndSort(_ items: [Suggestion]) -> [Suggestion] {
324|ff1146|        // Keep highest-scored entry per id.
325|f6e288|        var bestById: [String: Suggestion] = [:]
326|686171|        for item in items {
327|0701eb|            if let existing = bestById[item.id] {
328|d5a6de|                if item.score > existing.score {
329|763640|                    bestById[item.id] = item
330|4e2d32|                }
331|f5a6eb|            } else {
332|b949a2|                bestById[item.id] = item
333|a7dc16|            }
334|5f3077|        }
335|adc83b|
336|cfe5f9|        return bestById.values.sorted {
337|708c2d|            if $0.score != $1.score { return $0.score > $1.score }
338|e5aa71|            return $0.displayText.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1.displayText) == .orderedAscending
339|5f3077|        }
340|27e597|    }
341|adc83b|
342|ba218c|    private func apply(items: [Suggestion]) {
343|02d13b|        suggestionItems = items
344|f6da05|        suggestions = items.map { $0.displayText }
345|c77b90|        showSuggestions = !items.isEmpty
346|81a6a8|        selectedIndex = 0
347|27e597|    }

67|0532f5|    /// Updates the display of all cursors and selections
68|5f61b8|    func updateCursorDisplay() {
69|1b261a|        // Remove existing cursor and selection layers
70|36b44e|        cursorLayers.forEach { $0.removeFromSuperlayer() }
71|bb580b|        cursorLayers.removeAll()
72|a50cf9|        selectionLayers.forEach { $0.removeFromSuperlayer() }
73|582ae4|        selectionLayers.removeAll()
74|adc83b|
75|2ffb0a|        guard let editorCore = editorCore else { return }
76|15f135|        let cursors = editorCore.multiCursorState.cursors
77|adc83b|
78|a202cd|        // Only show additional cursors if we have multiple
79|71f1cc|        guard cursors.count > 1 else { return }
80|adc83b|
81|72ad69|        // Draw each cursor (skip the primary one as UITextView handles it)
82|16631c|        for (index, cursor) in cursors.enumerated() {
83|933ac1|            // Draw selection if present
84|94aef6|            if let selectionRange = cursor.selectionRange {
85|1d74b0|                drawSelection(for: selectionRange, isPrimary: cursor.isPrimary, index: index)
86|a7dc16|            }
87|adc83b|
88|c6cef0|            // Draw cursor line (skip primary cursor as system handles it)
89|bb0725|            if !cursor.isPrimary {
90|a10f1a|                drawCursor(at: cursor.position, isPrimary: false, index: index)
91|a7dc16|            }
92|5f3077|        }
93|27e597|    }
94|adc83b|
95|eb46c0|    private func drawCursor(at position: Int, isPrimary: Bool, index: Int) {
96|11ce2b|        guard let textPosition = self.position(from: beginningOfDocument, offset: position) else { return }
97|adc83b|
98|b34ecc|        let caretRect = self.caretRect(for: textPosition)
99|adc83b|
100|037254|        let cursorLayer = CALayer()
101|dc404a|        cursorLayer.backgroundColor = (isPrimary ? cursorColor : secondaryCursorColor).cgColor
102|66be0e|        cursorLayer.frame = CGRect(
103|0270b6|            x: caretRect.origin.x,
104|b56626|            y: caretRect.origin.y,
105|122136|            width: cursorWidth,
106|2f842a|            height: caretRect.height
107|3143a4|        )
108|8e5363|        cursorLayer.cornerRadius = 1
109|adc83b|
110|06cd55|        layer.addSublayer(cursorLayer)
111|6fd09e|        cursorLayers.append(cursorLayer)
112|27e597|    }
113|adc83b|
114|5a5008|    private func drawSelection(for range: NSRange, isPrimary: Bool, index: Int) {
115|2605b5|        guard let start = position(from: beginningOfDocument, offset: range.location),
116|cc2d91|              let end = position(from: beginningOfDocument, offset: range.location + range.length),
117|da2a96|              let textRange = self.textRange(from: start, to: end) else { return }
118|adc83b|
119|5d8027|        let selectionRects = selectionRects(for: textRange)
120|adc83b|
121|127303|        for rect in selectionRects {
122|433f1e|            let selectionLayer = CALayer()
123|f562d1|            selectionLayer.backgroundColor = (isPrimary ? selectionColor : secondarySelectionColor).cgColor
124|ce165e|            selectionLayer.frame = rect.rect
125|adc83b|
126|6930ca|            // Insert behind text
127|dc1f87|            if let textLayer = layer.sublayers?.first {
128|2b2195|                layer.insertSublayer(selectionLayer, below: textLayer)
129|f5a6eb|            } else {
130|1777fc|                layer.addSublayer(selectionLayer)
131|a7dc16|            }
132|6cbf28|            selectionLayers.append(selectionLayer)
133|5f3077|        }
134|27e597|    }

227|813e75|        ))
228|adc83b|
229|f3503e|        // NOTE: Cmd+D (Add Next Occurrence) is in SelectionMenuCommands.swift
230|fff75a|        // NOTE: Cmd+Shift+L (Select All Occurrences) is in SelectionMenuCommands.swift
231|bf8abf|        // NOTE: Cmd+G (Go to Line) is in GoMenuCommands.swift
232|adc83b|
233|5d2e6d|        // Escape: Dismiss autocomplete if visible, else exit multi-cursor mode
234|7ebe25|        // This is editor-specific and NOT a menu command

237|d15878|            action: #selector(escapeKeyPressed),
238|aa55b4|            input: UIKeyCommand.inputEscape,
239|e045cf|            modifierFlags: []
240|813e75|        ))
241|adc83b|
242|abb5c6|        return commands
243|27e597|    }

5|63c993|///
6|04c3a6|/// This is a lightweight overlay that approximates text positions using monospaced font metrics.
7|26c713|struct InlayHintsOverlay: View {
8|ecd9df|    let code: String
9|a420bb|    let language: CodeLanguage
10|adc83b|
11|218c5c|    /// 0-based top visible line index.
12|7d4a7e|    let scrollPosition: Int
13|adc83b|
14|96ac71|    let lineHeight: CGFloat
15|82ae06|    let fontSize: CGFloat
16|adc83b|
17|956caf|    /// Width reserved for the gutter (line numbers).
18|3e269f|    var gutterWidth: CGFloat = 60
19|adc83b|
20|d08fb9|    /// Insets used by the underlying UITextView.
21|a34599|    var textInsets: UIEdgeInsets = UIEdgeInsets(top: 8, left: 8, bottom: 8, right: 8)
22|adc83b|
23|093d2d|    /// Width reserved at the right edge (e.g. minimap).
24|3d8943|    var rightReservedWidth: CGFloat = 0
25|adc83b|
26|65131d|    /// How many spaces a tab visually represents.
27|c77e62|    var tabSize: Int = 4
28|adc83b|
29|7e4b1c|    @State private var hints: [InlayHintsManager.InlayHint] = []
30|adc83b|
31|504e43|    var body: some View {
32|151fd5|        GeometryReader { geo in
33|fd8d27|            let font = UIFont.monospacedSystemFont(ofSize: fontSize, weight: .regular)
34|36c5e7|            let charWidth = (" " as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: font]).width
35|1c711a|            let fontLineHeight = font.lineHeight
36|94577f|            let baselineAdjustment = max(0, (lineHeight - fontLineHeight) / 2)
37|20c353|            let maxVisibleLines = Int(ceil(geo.size.height / max(lineHeight, 1))) + 2
38|adc83b|
39|7ee956|            let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
40|adc83b|
41|8fd116|            ZStack(alignment: .topLeading) {
42|bfb2c3|                ForEach(hints) { hint in
43|d11cfb|                    if hint.line >= scrollPosition && hint.line <= (scrollPosition + maxVisibleLines) {
44|575bce|                        let lineText = (hint.line >= 0 && hint.line < lines.count) ? lines[hint.line] : ""
45|9bd59c|                        let visualColumn = visualColumn(in: lineText, utf16Column: hint.column, tabSize: tabSize)
46|adc83b|
47|54e15e|                        let x = gutterWidth + textInsets.left + (CGFloat(visualColumn) * charWidth)
48|0661b6|                        let y = textInsets.top + baselineAdjustment + (CGFloat(hint.line - scrollPosition) * lineHeight)
49|adc83b|
50|c03d5e|                        Text(hint.text)
51|281730|                            .font(.system(size: fontSize, design: .monospaced))
52|58afaa|                            .foregroundColor(Color.secondary.opacity(0.42))
53|52f453|                            .offset(x: x, y: y)
54|2fcb5e|                            .lineLimit(1)
55|d67542|                            .fixedSize(horizontal: true, vertical: false)
56|c9717a|                    }
57|4e2d32|                }
58|a7dc16|            }
59|28c929|            // Avoid drawing under minimap (or other right-side UI)
60|71aef5|            .frame(
61|e2cf1d|                width: max(0, geo.size.width - rightReservedWidth),
62|1b3c9d|                height: geo.size.height,
63|eab5e5|                alignment: .topLeading
64|43d041|            )
65|f9ebd1|            .clipped()
66|5f3077|        }
67|3fbfd2|        .allowsHitTesting(false)
68|b92cbc|        .onAppear { recompute() }
69|5086a1|        .onChange(of: code) { _ in recompute() }
70|49a675|        .onChange(of: language) { _ in recompute() }
71|27e597|    }
72|adc83b|
73|88a475|    private func recompute() {
74|88c74f|        hints = InlayHintsManager.shared.hints(for: code, language: language)
75|27e597|    }
76|adc83b|
77|211bd1|    private func visualColumn(in line: String, utf16Column: Int, tabSize: Int) -> Int {
78|397197|        let ns = line as NSString
79|0e6566|        let clamped = max(0, min(utf16Column, ns.length))
80|0b70a2|        let prefix = ns.substring(with: NSRange(location: 0, length: clamped))
81|adc83b|
82|a43b73|        var col = 0
83|955e8b|        for ch in prefix {
84|a3b6fb|            if ch == "\t" {
85|08173b|                col += tabSize
86|f5a6eb|            } else {
87|52486d|                col += 1
88|a7dc16|            }
89|5f3077|        }
90|a6794f|        return col
91|27e597|    }

94|85919d|    /// Renders the suggestion content with positioning and styling
95|c26dee|    private func suggestionContent(geometry geo: GeometryProxy) -> some View {
96|ed920c|        let font = UIFont.monospacedSystemFont(ofSize: fontSize, weight: .regular)
97|43ebbd|        let charWidth = (" " as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: font]).width
98|59feda|        let fontLineHeight = font.lineHeight
99|ea096d|        let baselineAdjustment = max(0, (lineHeight - fontLineHeight) / 2)
100|d6ed84|        
101|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
102|d6ed84|        
103|80b58a|        // Calculate the starting position
104|6934f5|        let startX: CGFloat
105|e9ff05|        let startY: CGFloat
106|d6ed84|        
107|b5802a|        // Get the current line text up to cursor position
108|730f7f|        let currentLineIndex = min(cursorPosition.line, max(0, lines.count - 1))
109|35c41a|        let currentLine = lines.indices.contains(currentLineIndex) ? lines[currentLineIndex] : ""
110|d6ed84|        
111|93ba2b|        // Calculate visual column for current position
112|77a4fb|        let visualColumn = visualColumn(in: currentLine, utf16Column: cursorPosition.column, tabSize: tabSize)
113|d6ed84|        
114|4983a9|        // Calculate starting X position (gutter + insets + character offset)
115|d1c5d0|        startX = gutterWidth + textInsets.left + (CGFloat(visualColumn) * charWidth)
116|d6ed84|        
117|7897cf|        // Calculate starting Y position (adjusted for scroll)
118|0814d0|        let visibleLineIndex = currentLineIndex - scrollPosition
119|f19a68|        startY = textInsets.top + baselineAdjustment + (CGFloat(visibleLineIndex) * lineHeight)
120|d6ed84|        
121|350fae|        // Split ghost text into lines
122|4772c4|        let ghostLines = ghostText.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
123|d6ed84|        
124|a785f0|        return ZStack(alignment: .topLeading) {
125|ae9297|            // Render each line of the suggestion
126|8e84ef|            ForEach(Array(ghostLines.enumerated()), id: \.offset) { index, line in
127|88574d|                // For multi-line suggestions, only the first line starts at cursor X
128|cb3269|                // Subsequent lines start from the left margin
129|fe243b|                let xOffset: CGFloat = index == 0 ? startX : gutterWidth + textInsets.left
130|dfc569|                let yOffset: CGFloat = startY + (CGFloat(index) * lineHeight)
131|216278|                
132|82e751|                // For lines after the first, include a visual indicator that it's a continuation
133|5d3e01|                let displayText = line
134|216278|                
135|07bf08|                Text(displayText)
136|79caf1|                    .font(.system(size: fontSize, design: .monospaced))
137|2d7e53|                    .foregroundColor(Color.gray.opacity(0.6))
138|fadc71|                    .offset(x: xOffset, y: yOffset)
139|97a348|                    .lineLimit(1)
140|b95b7a|                    .fixedSize(horizontal: true, vertical: false)
141|a7dc16|            }
142|3070d1|            
143|fc71cc|            // Tab to accept indicator
144|5d10de|            tabIndicatorView(
145|a65881|                startX: startX,
146|63dc7c|                startY: startY,
147|2eda94|                ghostLines: ghostLines,
148|5aff54|                charWidth: charWidth,
149|2baa3b|                font: font
150|43d041|            )
151|5f3077|        }
152|42bd11|        .transition(
153|707be8|            .asymmetric(
154|0f8270|                insertion: .opacity.animation(.easeIn(duration: animationDuration)),

156|43d041|            )
157|3143a4|        )
158|27e597|    }
159|b4687f|    
160|639f13|    /// Renders the "Tab to accept" indicator
161|ab8496|    private func tabIndicatorView(
162|53e652|        startX: CGFloat,
163|e0c064|        startY: CGFloat,
164|ff4216|        ghostLines: [String],
165|c15f5d|        charWidth: CGFloat,
166|8a49b8|        font: UIFont
167|0df0fe|    ) -> some View {
168|1da678|        // Calculate indicator position (below the suggestion or at the end of single line)
169|00151c|        let indicatorY: CGFloat
170|4a35f6|        let indicatorX: CGFloat
171|d6ed84|        
172|dfe58b|        if ghostLines.count > 1 {
173|75b141|            // For multi-line, show indicator at the end of last line
174|b4dd1a|            let lastLine = ghostLines.last ?? ""
175|027c9f|            let lastLineWidth = (lastLine as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: font]).width
176|5724eb|            indicatorX = startX + lastLineWidth
177|d0348b|            indicatorY = startY + (CGFloat(ghostLines.count - 1) * lineHeight)
178|b31999|        } else {
179|13a025|            // For single line, show indicator at the end of the text
180|fc6f06|            let lineWidth = (ghostText as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: font]).width
181|a4c799|            indicatorX = startX + lineWidth + 8 // Small gap after text
182|f294cf|            indicatorY = startY
183|5f3077|        }
184|d6ed84|        
185|3c25cc|        return HStack(spacing: 4) {
186|0977b8|            Image(systemName: "arrow.right.to.line")
187|c37787|                .font(.system(size: fontSize * 0.7))
188|3070d1|            
189|88d9d1|            Text("Tab")
190|105baa|                .font(.system(size: fontSize * 0.7, weight: .medium))
191|5f3077|        }
192|a358b9|        .foregroundColor(Color.gray.opacity(0.5))
193|7e0317|        .padding(.horizontal, 4)
194|44474c|        .padding(.vertical, 2)
195|413d6d|        .background(
196|ec701b|            RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 3)
197|d1a6ab|                .fill(Color.gray.opacity(0.1))
198|3143a4|        )
199|ac6737|        .offset(x: indicatorX, y: indicatorY + (lineHeight - font.lineHeight) / 2)
200|5ec87d|        .opacity(0.7)
201|27e597|    }
202|b4687f|    
203|5275c0|    /// Updates the visibility state with animation
204|7703e0|    private func updateVisibility() {
205|b4acfd|        let shouldBeVisible = hasSuggestion && isCursorVisible()
206|d6ed84|        
207|78528f|        if shouldBeVisible != isVisible {
208|c78858|            withAnimation(.easeInOut(duration: animationDuration)) {
209|42f9b7|                isVisible = shouldBeVisible
210|a7dc16|            }
211|5f3077|        }
212|27e597|    }
213|b4687f|    
214|547c79|    /// Checks if the cursor is currently visible in the viewport
215|5ce962|    private func isCursorVisible() -> Bool {
216|af7315|        let cursorLine = cursorPosition.line
217|b81434|        // Allow some margin for visibility (show if within viewport ± a few lines)
218|e9f34d|        let visibleRange = scrollPosition...(scrollPosition + 50) // Assuming ~50 visible lines
219|8fb6a3|        return visibleRange.contains(cursorLine)
220|27e597|    }
221|b4687f|    
222|76299b|    /// Calculates the visual column position accounting for tabs
223|211bd1|    private func visualColumn(in line: String, utf16Column: Int, tabSize: Int) -> Int {
224|397197|        let ns = line as NSString
225|0e6566|        let clamped = max(0, min(utf16Column, ns.length))
226|0b70a2|        let prefix = ns.substring(with: NSRange(location: 0, length: clamped))
227|d6ed84|        
228|a43b73|        var col = 0
229|955e8b|        for ch in prefix {
230|a3b6fb|            if ch == "\t" {
231|08173b|                col += tabSize
232|f5a6eb|            } else {
233|52486d|                col += 1
234|a7dc16|            }
235|5f3077|        }
236|a6794f|        return col
237|27e597|    }

187|3b223e|    private var diffGutter: some View {
188|8eb6a2|        GeometryReader { _ in
189|f47dba|            Canvas { context, size in
190|f2e3c7|                guard !visibleLineRange.isEmpty else { return }
191|adc83b|
192|1d1279|                let w = size.width
193|6cfee9|                let corner = configuration.gutterCornerRadius
194|adc83b|
195|c4be89|                for line in visibleLineRange {
196|1a6571|                    if let kind = changesByLine[line] {
197|7acfe4|                        let y = contentTopInset + CGFloat(line - visibleLineRange.lowerBound) * lineHeight
198|398690|                        let rect = CGRect(x: 0, y: y, width: w, height: max(1, lineHeight))
199|3e9bba|                        let path = Path(roundedRect: rect, cornerRadius: corner)
200|d14140|                        context.fill(path, with: .color(color(for: kind)))
201|c9717a|                    }
202|adc83b|
203|d80c45|                    // Deleted markers are drawn as triangles at the boundary.
204|d77c52|                    if deletedMarkers.contains(line) {
205|7acfe4|                        let y = contentTopInset + CGFloat(line - visibleLineRange.lowerBound) * lineHeight
206|f6ef50|                        var p = Path()
207|9c8d93|                        p.move(to: CGPoint(x: 0, y: y))
208|6c103f|                        p.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: w, y: y + (lineHeight * 0.5)))
209|4b3b60|                        p.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: 0, y: y + lineHeight))
210|eef458|                        p.closeSubpath()
211|c248e0|                        context.fill(p, with: .color(configuration.deletedColor))
212|c9717a|                    }
213|4e2d32|                }
214|a7dc16|            }
215|5f3077|        }
216|160ee5|        .accessibilityLabel("Git diff gutter")
217|27e597|    }

228|6cd76a|                    .offset(x: configuration.inlineBlameLeadingPadding, y: y)
229|9459d4|                    .allowsHitTesting(false)
230|a7dc16|            }

236|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
237|df7a5a|    private func inlineBlameLabel(for blame: GitBlameLine) -> some View {
238|c585c3|        let commitShort = String(blame.commit.prefix(8))
239|932efb|        let author = blame.author.isEmpty ? "Unknown" : blame.author
240|0dcb9b|        let summary = blame.summary
241|adc83b|
242|6cccbe|        Text("\(author) \(commitShort) — \(summary)")
243|d9ac71|            .font(configuration.inlineBlameFont)

245|96ccb2|            .lineLimit(1)
246|e3b182|            .truncationMode(.tail)
247|ac06c9|            .padding(.horizontal, 8)
248|bc0fb8|            .padding(.vertical, 4)
249|93d9bd|            .background(configuration.inlineBlameBackground)
250|de21c1|            .clipShape(RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: configuration.inlineBlameCornerRadius, style: .continuous))
251|27e597|    }

253|2eb426|    private func color(for kind: GitLineChangeKind) -> Color {
254|01fe0f|        switch kind {
255|8680a4|        case .added: return configuration.addedColor
256|d8c6ba|        case .modified: return configuration.modifiedColor
257|dd8fc2|        case .deleted: return configuration.deletedColor
258|5f3077|        }
259|27e597|    }

261|1950d9|    // MARK: Reload
262|adc83b|
263|0fd45c|    @MainActor
264|fb91cc|    private func reloadAll(force: Bool) async {
265|6deaac|        // Diff
266|40a056|        if configuration.showsDiffIndicators {
267|71cc09|            do {
268|fca72e|                let diff = try await dataSource.diff(fileURL, force)
269|6e72ba|                var byLine: [Int: GitLineChangeKind] = [:]
270|9310cd|                var deletions: Set<Int> = []
271|adc83b|
272|fa601b|                for c in diff {
273|c2ffec|                    switch c.kind {
274|824c69|                    case .deleted:
275|590b9b|                        deletions.insert(max(1, c.line))
276|7f90ef|                    case .added, .modified:
277|7a4f96|                        byLine[c.line] = c.kind
278|c9717a|                    }
279|4e2d32|                }
280|adc83b|
281|d5e452|                self.changesByLine = byLine
282|e772d6|                self.deletedMarkers = deletions
283|91b9a2|            } catch {
284|f656f2|                self.changesByLine = [:]
285|cf3009|                self.deletedMarkers = []
286|a7dc16|            }
287|5f3077|        }
288|adc83b|
289|a72dc6|        // Blame
290|a8ee41|        if configuration.showsInlineBlame {
291|71cc09|            do {
292|1fac4c|                let blame = try await dataSource.blame(fileURL, force)
293|ba24de|                self.blameByLine = Dictionary(uniqueKeysWithValues: blame.map { ($0.line, $0) })
294|91b9a2|            } catch {
295|262f69|                self.blameByLine = [:]
296|a7dc16|            }
297|5f3077|        }
298|27e597|    }

302|adc83b|
303|3fdc54|private enum GitError: Error, LocalizedError {
304|ad379b|    case notARepository
305|cc3a27|    case commandFailed(String)
306|adc83b|
307|242b78|    var errorDescription: String? {
308|2e6d08|        switch self {
309|d6bd44|        case .notARepository:
310|c737e7|            return "Not a git repository"
311|84e7f9|        case .commandFailed(let msg):
312|97e6c2|            return "Git command failed: \(msg)"
313|5f3077|        }
314|27e597|    }
315|b31277|}
316|adc83b|
317|e83eda|private struct GitShell {
318|36bf91|    static func runGit(args: [String], in workingDirectory: URL) async throws -> String {
319|fb15d6|        #if os(macOS) || targetEnvironment(macCatalyst) || os(Linux)
320|c9b222|        return try await withCheckedThrowingContinuation { cont in
321|13023b|            let process = Process()
322|9dce62|            process.executableURL = URL(fileURLWithPath: "/usr/bin/env")
323|6980d1|            process.arguments = ["git"] + args

369|3ed794|private actor GitDiffService {

371|adc83b|
372|d55783|    private var cache: [String: [GitLineChange]] = [:] // key: repoRoot + fileRelPath
373|adc83b|
374|348ef2|    func invalidate(forFile fileURL: URL) async {
375|4da690|        do {
376|a7d18f|            let repoRoot = try await GitShell.repoRoot(containing: fileURL)
377|c274c2|            let relPath = Self.relativePath(fileURL, repoRoot)
378|37ccff|            let key = repoRoot.path + "::" + relPath
379|5c07e2|            cache.removeValue(forKey: key)
380|853889|        } catch {
381|0ef52b|            // ignore
382|5f3077|        }
383|27e597|    }
384|adc83b|
385|5ad013|    func lineChanges(forFile fileURL: URL) async throws -> [GitLineChange] {
386|84184f|        let repoRoot = try await GitShell.repoRoot(containing: fileURL)
387|7cb904|        let relPath = Self.relativePath(fileURL, repoRoot)
388|471cce|        let key = repoRoot.path + "::" + relPath
389|adc83b|
390|04a632|        if let cached = cache[key] { return cached }
391|adc83b|
392|18475b|        // Unified=0 makes hunks contain only the changed lines, simplifying mapping.
393|471a19|        let diff = try await GitShell.runGit(
394|0211d7|            args: ["-C", repoRoot.path, "diff", "--unified=0", "--no-color", "--", relPath],
395|2f85ba|            in: repoRoot
396|3143a4|        )
397|adc83b|
398|cb6bb6|        let parsed = Self.parseUnifiedZeroDiff(diff)
399|fd7b4b|        cache[key] = parsed
400|4686f7|        return parsed
401|27e597|    }
402|adc83b|
403|7f38bd|    fileprivate static func relativePath(_ fileURL: URL, _ repoRoot: URL) -> String {
404|d34cf8|        let filePath = fileURL.standardizedFileURL.path
405|d236cb|        let rootPath = repoRoot.standardizedFileURL.path
406|87d341|        if filePath.hasPrefix(rootPath + "/") {
407|c8ae11|            return String(filePath.dropFirst(rootPath.count + 1))
408|5f3077|        }
409|231fb2|        return fileURL.lastPathComponent
410|27e597|    }
411|adc83b|
412|4ab2d0|    /// Parse output from: `git diff --unified=0 --no-color -- <file>`.
413|2cbc84|    ///
414|043652|    /// Heuristic classification per hunk:
415|e6cab5|    /// - oldCount==0,newCount>0 -> .added on new range
416|830185|    /// - oldCount>0,newCount>0 -> .modified on new range
417|d827b0|    /// - oldCount>0,newCount==0 -> .deleted marker at newStart
418|e30ee3|    private static func parseUnifiedZeroDiff(_ text: String) -> [GitLineChange] {
419|0c442a|        var results: [GitLineChange] = []
420|adc83b|
421|5283b2|        // Example hunk header (unified=0):
422|61ad0c|        // @@ -12,2 +12,3 @@
423|960d91|        // or @@ -12 +12 @@
424|53c1fb|        for raw in text.split(separator: "\n", omittingEmptySubsequences: false) {
425|338332|            let line = String(raw)
426|566e9f|            guard line.hasPrefix("@@"), let h = parseHunkHeader(line) else { continue }
427|adc83b|
428|ce5131|            if h.oldCount == 0 && h.newCount > 0 {
429|5447be|                for n in 0..<h.newCount {
430|c93a02|                    results.append(.init(line: h.newStart + n, kind: .added))
431|4e2d32|                }
432|688fe3|            } else if h.oldCount > 0 && h.newCount > 0 {
433|5447be|                for n in 0..<h.newCount {
434|9de390|                    results.append(.init(line: h.newStart + n, kind: .modified))
435|4e2d32|                }
436|b8c2f6|            } else if h.oldCount > 0 && h.newCount == 0 {
437|d2860f|                results.append(.init(line: max(1, h.newStart), kind: .deleted))
438|a7dc16|            }
439|5f3077|        }
440|adc83b|
441|877b21|        // De-dupe (prefer modified over added if collision).
442|d9be21|        var byLine: [Int: GitLineChangeKind] = [:]
443|9c02f9|        var deleted: Set<Int> = []
444|6ab11d|        for r in results {
445|b275dd|            switch r.kind {
446|e08d5d|            case .deleted:
447|22dea6|                deleted.insert(r.line)
448|0ad1c2|            case .added:
449|2faf5e|                if byLine[r.line] == nil { byLine[r.line] = .added }
450|909e67|            case .modified:
451|35bde7|                byLine[r.line] = .modified
452|a7dc16|            }
453|5f3077|        }
454|adc83b|
455|cbba29|        var merged: [GitLineChange] = []
456|8455c8|        for (line, kind) in byLine { merged.append(.init(line: line, kind: kind)) }
457|303285|        for d in deleted { merged.append(.init(line: d, kind: .deleted)) }
458|adc83b|
459|2c2d8a|        return merged.sorted { $0.line < $1.line }
460|27e597|    }
461|adc83b|
462|04b6a6|    private struct Hunk {
463|703f57|        var oldStart: Int
464|9021d9|        var oldCount: Int
465|5918d9|        var newStart: Int
466|c74eb3|        var newCount: Int
467|27e597|    }
468|adc83b|
469|c5499e|    private static func parseHunkHeader(_ header: String) -> Hunk? {
470|ba73ec|        // Header format: @@ -oldStart,oldCount +newStart,newCount @@ ...
471|7417bc|        // Counts may be omitted: -12 +12
472|ecf5bf|        guard let rangeStart = header.range(of: "@@") else { return nil }
473|7c0e7f|        guard let rangeEnd = header.range(of: "@@", options: [], range: rangeStart.upperBound..<header.endIndex) else { return nil }
474|8445bb|        let body = header[rangeStart.upperBound..<rangeEnd.lowerBound].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
475|adc83b|
476|d7518c|        let parts = body.split(separator: " ")
477|246d66|        guard parts.count >= 2 else { return nil }
478|adc83b|
479|305ea0|        func parsePart(_ s: Substring, prefix: Character) -> (Int, Int)? {
480|358d18|            guard s.first == prefix else { return nil }
481|f55934|            let rest = s.dropFirst()
482|66d2d2|            if let comma = rest.firstIndex(of: ",") {
483|8b33f9|                let a = rest[..<comma]
484|95dc6a|                let b = rest[rest.index(after: comma)...]
485|17c68e|                guard let start = Int(a), let count = Int(b) else { return nil }
486|08311d|                return (start, count)
487|f5a6eb|            } else {
488|104757|                guard let start = Int(rest) else { return nil }
489|b303d1|                return (start, 1)
490|a7dc16|            }
491|5f3077|        }
492|adc83b|
493|c2352c|        guard let old = parsePart(parts[0], prefix: "-") else { return nil }
494|868552|        guard let new = parsePart(parts[1], prefix: "+") else { return nil }
495|1713af|        return Hunk(oldStart: old.0, oldCount: old.1, newStart: new.0, newCount: new.1)
496|27e597|    }

750|8e1da6|        // Configure for VS Code web
751|7e3f69|        let config = WKWebViewConfiguration()
752|8696cc|        config.websiteDataStore = .default() // Persist cookies/storage
753|d6ed84|        
754|d67634|        // Enable required features
755|487c76|        let prefs = WKWebpagePreferences()
756|86af21|        prefs.allowsContentJavaScript = true
757|414623|        config.defaultWebpagePreferences = prefs
758|d6ed84|        
759|b48d26|        // JavaScript message handlers for debugging
760|723001|        let contentController = WKUserContentController()
761|837fa8|        contentController.add(context.coordinator, name: "consoleLog")
762|97b3b8|        contentController.add(context.coordinator, name: "consoleError")
763|8e77bd|        contentController.add(context.coordinator, name: "vsCodeError")
764|d6ed84|        
765|148e95|        // Intercept console.log and console.error
766|730773|        let consoleScript = WKUserScript(source: """
767|027e5e|            (function() {
768|5b037f|                var originalLog = console.log;
769|a00b4c|                var originalError = console.error;
770|8a0bc0|                var originalWarn = console.warn;
771|216278|                
772|531409|                console.log = function() {
773|c104b9|                    var args = Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments);
774|3c008f|                    window.webkit.messageHandlers.consoleLog.postMessage(args.map(String).join(' '));
775|a0c6d6|                    originalLog.apply(console, arguments);
776|2c6774|                };
777|216278|                
778|815b07|                console.error = function() {
779|c104b9|                    var args = Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments);
780|1c2e4c|                    window.webkit.messageHandlers.consoleError.postMessage(args.map(String).join(' '));
781|8f115c|                    originalError.apply(console, arguments);
782|2c6774|                };
783|216278|                
784|37352b|                console.warn = function() {
785|c104b9|                    var args = Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments);
786|75069d|                    window.webkit.messageHandlers.consoleLog.postMessage('[WARN] ' + args.map(String).join(' '));
787|c77318|                    originalWarn.apply(console, arguments);
788|2c6774|                };
789|43941f|            })();
790|b60319|        """, injectionTime: .atDocumentStart, forMainFrameOnly: false)
791|196292|        contentController.addUserScript(consoleScript)
792|d6ed84|

794|d6ed84|

798|d6ed84|        
799|5d6c5a|        let webView = WKWebView(frame: .zero, configuration: config)

801|c07abd|        webView.uiDelegate = context.coordinator

911|c571df|                        Image(systemName: config.type.icon).font(.title2).foregroundColor(.accentColor).frame(width: 32)
912|ad274d|                        VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 4) {
913|96a8ca|                            Text(config.name).font(.headline).foregroundColor(.primary)
914|5c05ac|                            Text(config.url).font(.caption).foregroundColor(.secondary).lineLimit(1)
915|3cbb40|                            if let lastUsed = config.lastUsed {

917|c3ec2b|                                    .font(.caption2).foregroundColor(.secondary)
918|89d40a|                            }
919|392b35|                        }

2|adc83b|
3|6505f2|/// A lightweight inlay-hints engine used to show inline type annotations.
4|63c993|///
5|18e543|/// Scope (FEAT-133):
6|1f06c1|/// - Detect simple Swift variable declarations without explicit types.
7|6b0114|/// - Infer basic types from the initializer expression.
8|b1b02e|/// - Return hint objects with line/column + a display string (e.g. ": Int").
9|4f8cca|final class InlayHintsManager {
10|5960e0|    static let shared = InlayHintsManager()
11|54113e|    private init() {}
12|adc83b|
13|d9f5b5|    // MARK: - Models
14|adc83b|
15|14e2da|    struct InlayHint: Identifiable, Equatable {
16|d16339|        let id = UUID()
17|adc83b|
18|7a2975|        /// 0-based line index.
19|c0eddc|        let line: Int
20|adc83b|
21|efa22a|        /// 0-based UTF16 column index within the line.
22|1b9532|        let column: Int
23|adc83b|
24|c52f44|        /// Render-ready hint text (e.g. ": Int").
25|aa57fc|        let text: String
26|27e597|    }
27|adc83b|
28|36e755|    // MARK: - Public API
29|adc83b|
30|2ce197|    func hints(for code: String, language: CodeLanguage) -> [InlayHint] {
31|b95802|        guard language == .swift else { return [] }
32|bb2b0b|        return swiftTypeHints(for: code)
33|27e597|    }
34|adc83b|
35|52c601|    // MARK: - Swift parsing
36|adc83b|
37|16c9d6|    private func swiftTypeHints(for code: String) -> [InlayHint] {
38|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
39|46c824|        var result: [InlayHint] = []
40|adc83b|
41|225f78|        // Matches:
42|e2c046|        //   let x = 5
43|2cac4f|        //   var name = "abc"
44|21217b|        // Avoids explicit type annotations because the pattern does not accept `:` before `=`.
45|49e410|        let pattern = "^\\s*(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*=\\s*(.+)$"
46|72432c|        let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: [])
47|adc83b|
48|d1a1ab|        for (lineIndex, line) in lines.enumerated() {
49|cbe876|            let trimmed = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
50|9b2e7c|            guard !trimmed.hasPrefix("//"), !trimmed.isEmpty else { continue }
51|adc83b|
52|18a8aa|            let nsLine = line as NSString
53|89c109|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: nsLine.length)
54|c471d9|            guard let match = regex?.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: range) else { continue }
55|ad3867|            guard match.numberOfRanges >= 3 else { continue }
56|adc83b|
57|423174|            let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
58|3c5579|            let rhsRange = match.range(at: 2)
59|7a7150|            if nameRange.location == NSNotFound || rhsRange.location == NSNotFound { continue }
60|adc83b|
61|165da4|            // Basic sanity checks: ignore tuple bindings like `let (a, b) = ...`
62|679645|            let name = nsLine.substring(with: nameRange)
63|5c9927|            guard !name.isEmpty else { continue }
64|adc83b|
65|666b05|            // RHS, stripped of trailing `//` comments (naive but practical).
66|53413c|            var rhs = nsLine.substring(with: rhsRange)
67|8beea4|            if let commentRange = rhs.range(of: "//") {
68|a56309|                rhs = String(rhs[..<commentRange.lowerBound])
69|a7dc16|            }
70|107569|            rhs = rhs.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
71|adc83b|
72|8f6e07|            // Infer a type. If we can’t infer, don’t create a hint.
73|992808|            guard let inferred = inferSwiftType(from: rhs) else { continue }
74|adc83b|
75|ed8c63|            // Column for hint placement = end of identifier.
76|f4b52b|            let hintColumn = nameRange.location + nameRange.length
77|32af9e|            result.append(InlayHint(line: lineIndex, column: hintColumn, text: ": \(inferred)"))
78|5f3077|        }
79|adc83b|
80|67ed82|        return result
81|27e597|    }
82|adc83b|
83|014518|    // MARK: - Swift type inference (basic)
84|adc83b|
85|e4ea7a|    private func inferSwiftType(from rawExpression: String) -> String? {
86|3784b4|        let expr = rawExpression.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
87|a14679|        guard !expr.isEmpty else { return nil }
88|adc83b|
89|ea35f3|        // Bool
90|62989c|        if expr == "true" || expr == "false" { return "Bool" }
91|adc83b|
92|5f3b7c|        // String literal (simple)
93|553d7e|        if expr.hasPrefix("\"") { return "String" }
94|adc83b|
95|f70754|        // Numeric: Int
96|b5aa27|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+$") { return "Int" }
97|f87d78|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0x[0-9A-Fa-f]+$") { return "Int" }
98|212646|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0b[01]+$") { return "Int" }
99|d18d43|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0o[0-7]+$") { return "Int" }
100|adc83b|
101|e6218e|        // Numeric: Double (Swift defaults floating-point literals to Double)
102|53b861|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+\\.\\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\\d+)?$") { return "Double" }
103|71e012|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\\d+)$") { return "Double" }
104|adc83b|
105|69d592|        // Array / Dictionary literals
106|20ec44|        if expr.hasPrefix("[") {
107|ce2ebb|            if let dictType = inferDictionaryType(from: expr) { return dictType }
108|f27fb4|            if let arrayType = inferArrayType(from: expr) { return arrayType }
109|5f3077|        }
110|adc83b|
111|c1c62e|        // Constructor-looking calls: `TypeName(...)` (biased toward UpperCamelCase types)
112|c8a287|        if let typeName = firstRegexGroup(expr, pattern: "^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*\\(") {
113|7cdb04|            return typeName
114|5f3077|        }
115|adc83b|
116|9ff15e|        // Enum/static member: `TypeName.member`
117|7c8b37|        if let typeName = firstRegexGroup(expr, pattern: "^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\.[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$") {
118|7cdb04|            return typeName
119|5f3077|        }
120|adc83b|
121|c2ae65|        return nil
122|27e597|    }
123|adc83b|
124|ebc532|    private func inferArrayType(from expr: String) -> String? {
125|53c5a0|        let trimmed = expr.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
126|c8c4b9|        guard trimmed.hasPrefix("[") && trimmed.hasSuffix("]") else { return nil }
127|adc83b|
128|81b2b5|        let inner = trimmed.dropFirst().dropLast().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
129|4d16d8|        if inner.isEmpty { return "[Any]" }
130|adc83b|
131|bdbc65|        // Take the first top-level element (naive: split by comma).
132|51ddab|        let firstPart = inner.split(separator: ",", maxSplits: 1, omittingEmptySubsequences: true).first
133|3197f4|        guard let first = firstPart.map(String.init)?.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines), !first.isEmpty else {
134|88e905|            return "[Any]"
135|5f3077|        }
136|adc83b|
137|e844da|        if let elementType = inferSwiftType(from: first) {
138|655e59|            return "[\(elementType)]"
139|5f3077|        }
140|adc83b|
141|77d208|        return "[Any]"
142|27e597|    }
143|adc83b|
144|f7b9b1|    private func inferDictionaryType(from expr: String) -> String? {
145|53c5a0|        let trimmed = expr.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
146|c8c4b9|        guard trimmed.hasPrefix("[") && trimmed.hasSuffix("]") else { return nil }
147|adc83b|
148|85eff8|        // Fast check: dictionary literals must contain `:` somewhere.
149|8a247d|        guard trimmed.contains(":") else { return nil }
150|adc83b|
151|81b2b5|        let inner = trimmed.dropFirst().dropLast().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
152|be74cb|        if inner.isEmpty { return "[AnyHashable: Any]" }
153|adc83b|
154|141281|        // Grab the first `key: value` pair (naive: up to first comma).
155|53580e|        let firstPair = inner.split(separator: ",", maxSplits: 1, omittingEmptySubsequences: true).first.map(String.init) ?? ""
156|2ae14f|        guard let colonIndex = firstPair.firstIndex(of: ":") else { return nil }
157|adc83b|
158|90fe28|        let keyExpr = String(firstPair[..<colonIndex]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
159|c8c196|        let valueExpr = String(firstPair[firstPair.index(after: colonIndex)...]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
160|adc83b|
161|28ea5b|        let keyType = inferSwiftType(from: keyExpr) ?? "AnyHashable"
162|eb3fdd|        let valueType = inferSwiftType(from: valueExpr) ?? "Any"
163|31573c|        return "[\(keyType): \(valueType)]"
164|27e597|    }
165|adc83b|
166|e21b8f|    // MARK: - Regex helpers
167|adc83b|
168|3efaff|    private func matches(_ text: String, pattern: String) -> Bool {
169|695372|        (try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []))?.firstMatch(
170|7697e1|            in: text,
171|11ba8c|            options: [],
172|264c2c|            range: NSRange(location: 0, length: (text as NSString).length)
173|d36f78|        ) != nil
174|27e597|    }
175|adc83b|
176|133a2e|    private func firstRegexGroup(_ text: String, pattern: String) -> String? {
177|473ca5|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return nil }
178|c60005|        let ns = text as NSString
179|05fef3|        let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
180|090ffd|        guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: text, options: [], range: range), match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return nil }
181|5ad252|        let r = match.range(at: 1)
182|8bd644|        guard r.location != NSNotFound else { return nil }
183|2550a5|        return ns.substring(with: r)
184|27e597|    }
185|b31277|}
186|adc83b|

4|c05fff|/// Manages bracket matching and highlighting for the editor.
