6|7bd41f|final class BracketMatchingManager {
7|4cc89e|    static let shared = BracketMatchingManager()
8|54113e|    private init() {}
9|b4687f|    
10|d9f5b5|    // MARK: - Models
11|b4687f|    
12|e0c0d9|    struct BracketPair: Equatable {
13|75ca17|        let openIndex: Int
14|ec9e05|        let closeIndex: Int
15|62324c|        let type: BracketType
16|27e597|    }
17|b4687f|    
18|6fba24|    enum BracketType: Character, CaseIterable {
19|41cfb5|        case parenthesis = "("
20|ed3b2a|        case square = "["
21|02baf6|        case curly = "{"
22|d6ed84|        
23|0f55ca|        var open: Character {
24|20c960|            switch self {
25|d8be6b|            case .parenthesis: return "("
26|35050d|            case .square: return "["
27|4ce5b3|            case .curly: return "{"
28|a7dc16|            }
29|5f3077|        }
30|d6ed84|        
31|65a059|        var close: Character {
32|20c960|            switch self {
33|ea34c0|            case .parenthesis: return ")"
34|ededf1|            case .square: return "]"
35|a807d7|            case .curly: return "}"
36|a7dc16|            }
37|5f3077|        }
38|d6ed84|        
39|71094e|        static func from(char: Character) -> (type: BracketType, isOpen: Bool)? {
40|684645|            for type in BracketType.allCases {
41|ae5609|                if char == type.open { return (type, true) }
42|fc9913|                if char == type.close { return (type, false) }
43|a7dc16|            }
44|1c8557|            return nil
45|5f3077|        }
46|27e597|    }
47|b4687f|    
48|36e755|    // MARK: - Public API
49|b4687f|    
50|6d9f0a|    /// Finds the matching bracket for the bracket at or near the given cursor position.
51|46e14e|    /// Returns nil if no bracket is found at the cursor position.
52|a86427|    func findMatchingBracket(in text: String, cursorPosition: Int) -> BracketPair? {
53|4c2df9|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return nil }
54|d6ed84|        
55|9df2e8|        let chars = Array(text)
56|7169cc|        let count = chars.count
57|d6ed84|        
58|eb0050|        // Clamp cursor position
59|112372|        let pos = max(0, min(cursorPosition, count))
60|d6ed84|        
61|404d74|        // Check character at cursor and before cursor
62|58bc54|        let positionsToCheck = [pos, pos - 1].filter { $0 >= 0 && $0 < count }
63|d6ed84|        
64|fd29be|        for checkPos in positionsToCheck {
65|a27369|            let char = chars[checkPos]
66|3070d1|            
67|e89ec3|            if let (bracketType, isOpen) = BracketType.from(char: char) {
68|3a7bbf|                if isOpen {
69|265e1e|                    // Search forward for closing bracket
70|817469|                    if let closeIndex = findClosingBracket(in: chars, from: checkPos, type: bracketType) {
71|0deeaf|                        return BracketPair(openIndex: checkPos, closeIndex: closeIndex, type: bracketType)
72|c9717a|                    }
73|fdd0e2|                } else {
74|e9cd75|                    // Search backward for opening bracket
75|b6a492|                    if let openIndex = findOpeningBracket(in: chars, from: checkPos, type: bracketType) {
76|7b17bb|                        return BracketPair(openIndex: openIndex, closeIndex: checkPos, type: bracketType)
77|c9717a|                    }
78|4e2d32|                }
79|a7dc16|            }
80|5f3077|        }
81|d6ed84|        
82|c2ae65|        return nil
83|27e597|    }
84|b4687f|    
85|25e770|    /// Finds all bracket pairs in the given text.
86|81d973|    /// Useful for rainbow bracket coloring.
87|ff38bb|    func findAllBracketPairs(in text: String) -> [BracketPair] {
88|dcb8ea|        var pairs: [BracketPair] = []
89|3e3195|        var stacks: [BracketType: [Int]] = [:]
90|d6ed84|        
91|f022b0|        for type in BracketType.allCases {
92|54a3ff|            stacks[type] = []
93|5f3077|        }
94|d6ed84|        
95|9df2e8|        let chars = Array(text)
96|e79b86|        var inString = false
97|11024e|        var stringChar: Character = "\""
98|e550d2|        var escapeNext = false
99|d6ed84|        
100|f0ad7e|        for (index, char) in chars.enumerated() {
101|11cf75|            // Handle escape sequences
102|5c254a|            if escapeNext {
103|b7c801|                escapeNext = false
104|1df510|                continue
105|a7dc16|            }
106|3070d1|            
107|b316c9|            if char == "\\" {
108|78ee7a|                escapeNext = true
109|1df510|                continue
110|a7dc16|            }
111|3070d1|            
112|209ff5|            // Handle string literals
113|631cb5|            if char == "\"" || char == "'" {
114|9f8dba|                if !inString {
115|cce9f8|                    inString = true
116|fd9c87|                    stringChar = char
117|d26b9a|                } else if char == stringChar {
118|dffb64|                    inString = false
119|4e2d32|                }
120|1df510|                continue
121|a7dc16|            }
122|3070d1|            
123|801179|            // Skip brackets inside strings
124|28e059|            if inString { continue }
125|3070d1|            
126|ae2237|            // Check for brackets
127|e89ec3|            if let (bracketType, isOpen) = BracketType.from(char: char) {
128|3a7bbf|                if isOpen {
129|059a6a|                    stacks[bracketType]?.append(index)
130|fdd0e2|                } else {
131|a4ab35|                    if let openIndex = stacks[bracketType]?.popLast() {
132|25a92d|                        pairs.append(BracketPair(openIndex: openIndex, closeIndex: index, type: bracketType))
133|c9717a|                    }
134|4e2d32|                }
135|a7dc16|            }
136|5f3077|        }
137|d6ed84|        
138|4ca1cd|        return pairs.sorted { $0.openIndex < $1.openIndex }
139|27e597|    }
140|b4687f|    
141|205c7f|    /// Returns the nesting depth at a given position (for rainbow brackets).
142|a4a973|    func nestingDepth(at position: Int, in text: String, type: BracketType? = nil) -> Int {
143|9df2e8|        let chars = Array(text)
144|384363|        var depth = 0
145|e79b86|        var inString = false
146|11024e|        var stringChar: Character = "\""
147|e550d2|        var escapeNext = false
148|d6ed84|        
149|f0ad7e|        for (index, char) in chars.enumerated() {
150|052872|            if index >= position { break }
151|3070d1|            
152|5c254a|            if escapeNext {
153|b7c801|                escapeNext = false
154|1df510|                continue
155|a7dc16|            }
156|3070d1|            
157|b316c9|            if char == "\\" {
158|78ee7a|                escapeNext = true
159|1df510|                continue
160|a7dc16|            }
161|3070d1|            
162|631cb5|            if char == "\"" || char == "'" {
163|9f8dba|                if !inString {
164|cce9f8|                    inString = true
165|fd9c87|                    stringChar = char
166|d26b9a|                } else if char == stringChar {
167|dffb64|                    inString = false
168|4e2d32|                }
169|1df510|                continue
170|a7dc16|            }
171|3070d1|            
172|28e059|            if inString { continue }
173|3070d1|            
174|e89ec3|            if let (bracketType, isOpen) = BracketType.from(char: char) {
175|fa1024|                if type == nil || bracketType == type {
176|e8b397|                    depth += isOpen ? 1 : -1
177|4e2d32|                }
178|a7dc16|            }
179|5f3077|        }
180|d6ed84|        
181|cb4b5f|        return max(0, depth)
182|27e597|    }

186|e194e7|    private func findClosingBracket(in chars: [Character], from startIndex: Int, type: BracketType) -> Int? {
187|29e83a|        var depth = 1
188|e79b86|        var inString = false
189|11024e|        var stringChar: Character = "\""
190|e550d2|        var escapeNext = false
191|d6ed84|        
192|a7f4a5|        for i in (startIndex + 1)..<chars.count {
193|8672ad|            let char = chars[i]
194|3070d1|            
195|5c254a|            if escapeNext {
196|b7c801|                escapeNext = false
197|1df510|                continue
198|a7dc16|            }
199|3070d1|            
200|b316c9|            if char == "\\" {
201|78ee7a|                escapeNext = true
202|1df510|                continue
203|a7dc16|            }
204|3070d1|            
205|631cb5|            if char == "\"" || char == "'" {
206|9f8dba|                if !inString {
207|cce9f8|                    inString = true
208|fd9c87|                    stringChar = char
209|d26b9a|                } else if char == stringChar {
210|dffb64|                    inString = false
211|4e2d32|                }
212|1df510|                continue
213|a7dc16|            }
214|3070d1|            
215|28e059|            if inString { continue }
216|3070d1|            
217|dc1b47|            if char == type.open {
218|4994cd|                depth += 1
219|5707b1|            } else if char == type.close {
220|ae2b9f|                depth -= 1
221|f13da5|                if depth == 0 {
222|125c3c|                    return i
223|4e2d32|                }
224|a7dc16|            }
225|5f3077|        }
226|d6ed84|        
227|c2ae65|        return nil
228|27e597|    }
229|b4687f|    
230|d81681|    private func findOpeningBracket(in chars: [Character], from startIndex: Int, type: BracketType) -> Int? {
231|29e83a|        var depth = 1
232|e79b86|        var inString = false
233|11024e|        var stringChar: Character = "\""
234|d6ed84|        
235|f6da67|        // For backward search, we need a simpler approach since escape sequences are tricky
236|fe2046|        // We'll do a basic scan that handles most common cases
237|267cd6|        for i in stride(from: startIndex - 1, through: 0, by: -1) {
238|8672ad|            let char = chars[i]
239|3070d1|            
240|1d0b12|            // Simple string detection (not perfect but handles common cases)
241|631cb5|            if char == "\"" || char == "'" {
242|9df61c|                // Check if escaped
243|d575e8|                if i > 0 && chars[i - 1] == "\\" {
244|f41bef|                    continue
245|4e2d32|                }
246|399b31|                inString = !inString
247|54e155|                stringChar = char
248|1df510|                continue
249|a7dc16|            }
250|3070d1|            
251|28e059|            if inString { continue }
252|3070d1|            
253|b67e2d|            if char == type.close {
254|4994cd|                depth += 1
255|d1d7f1|            } else if char == type.open {
256|ae2b9f|                depth -= 1
257|f13da5|                if depth == 0 {
258|125c3c|                    return i
259|4e2d32|                }
260|a7dc16|            }
261|5f3077|        }
262|d6ed84|        
263|c2ae65|        return nil
264|27e597|    }

266|adc83b|
267|0fe46b|// MARK: - Rainbow Bracket Colors
268|adc83b|

274|9757eb|            UIColor(red: 0.85, green: 0.44, blue: 0.84, alpha: 1.0),  // Purple

278|922ac4|            UIColor(red: 0.64, green: 0.51, blue: 0.91, alpha: 1.0),  // Lavender
279|220505|        ]

2|9ed0a9|import UIKit
3|adc83b|
4|4d7b2e|/// Highlights all occurrences of the currently selected word in the editor.
5|9741e9|/// This is a key VSCode feature - when you select/double-click a word, all other
6|b48e9d|/// instances get a subtle background highlight.
7|d26d31|final class WordOccurrenceHighlighter {
8|247366|    static let shared = WordOccurrenceHighlighter()
9|54113e|    private init() {}
10|b4687f|    
11|f5c08e|    // MARK: - Configuration
12|b4687f|    
13|7c3bf1|    /// Minimum word length to trigger highlighting
14|d7e9fc|    var minimumWordLength: Int = 2
15|b4687f|    
16|01c4aa|    /// Maximum occurrences to highlight (for performance)
17|c1fe73|    var maxOccurrences: Int = 500
18|b4687f|    
19|3dcc5f|    /// Whether highlighting is enabled
20|cab970|    var isEnabled: Bool = true
21|b4687f|    
22|d9f5b5|    // MARK: - Models
23|b4687f|    
24|bc1b35|    struct Occurrence: Equatable {
25|fc96cf|        let range: NSRange
26|30b904|        let lineNumber: Int
27|27e597|    }
28|b4687f|    
29|36e755|    // MARK: - Public API
30|b4687f|    
31|0db09b|    /// Finds all occurrences of the word at the given selection.
32|782867|    /// Returns empty array if selection is not a valid word.
33|03c715|    func findOccurrences(in text: String, selection: NSRange) -> [Occurrence] {
34|26a118|        guard isEnabled else { return [] }
35|1e8f51|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return [] }
36|d6ed84|        
37|96769a|        // Get the selected word (or word at cursor)
38|8d5934|        let selectedWord = getWordAtSelection(in: text, selection: selection)
39|11239b|        guard let word = selectedWord, word.count >= minimumWordLength else { return [] }
40|d6ed84|        
41|c59428|        // Don't highlight if selection spans multiple words
42|55f097|        if selection.length > 0 {
43|b036f2|            let selectedText = (text as NSString).substring(with: selection)
44|fe4a6e|            if selectedText.contains(" ") || selectedText.contains("\n") {
45|f82059|                return []
46|a7dc16|            }
47|5f3077|        }
48|d6ed84|        
49|fb07c9|        return findAllOccurrences(of: word, in: text)
50|27e597|    }
51|b4687f|    
52|3a75eb|    /// Finds all occurrences of a specific word in text.
53|f7a572|    func findAllOccurrences(of word: String, in text: String) -> [Occurrence] {
54|3cb057|        guard !word.isEmpty, !text.isEmpty else { return [] }
55|d6ed84|        
56|1f64f3|        var occurrences: [Occurrence] = []
57|599630|        let nsText = text as NSString
58|aeec71|        let textLength = nsText.length
59|d6ed84|        
60|51ec77|        // Use word boundary matching for whole words only
61|d0a79c|        var searchStart = 0
62|eeb1ac|        var count = 0
63|d6ed84|        
64|610917|        while searchStart < textLength && count < maxOccurrences {
65|a973f7|            let searchRange = NSRange(location: searchStart, length: textLength - searchStart)
66|ee2e33|            let foundRange = nsText.range(of: word, options: .literal, range: searchRange)
67|3070d1|            
68|d96f17|            if foundRange.location == NSNotFound {
69|74cfd8|                break
70|a7dc16|            }
71|3070d1|            
72|968346|            // Check word boundaries
73|d2562b|            if isWholeWord(range: foundRange, in: nsText) {
74|bb074f|                let lineNumber = lineNumber(at: foundRange.location, in: nsText)
75|1fc2a4|                occurrences.append(Occurrence(range: foundRange, lineNumber: lineNumber))
76|31d0c1|                count += 1
77|a7dc16|            }
78|3070d1|            
79|df59ca|            searchStart = foundRange.location + foundRange.length
80|5f3077|        }
81|d6ed84|        
82|39951e|        return occurrences
83|27e597|    }
84|b4687f|    
85|0f4930|    /// Gets the word at or around the selection/cursor position.
86|71f28a|    func getWordAtSelection(in text: String, selection: NSRange) -> String? {
87|599630|        let nsText = text as NSString
88|e7c576|        let length = nsText.length
89|d6ed84|        
90|ffdf26|        guard length > 0 else { return nil }
91|d6ed84|        
92|deb447|        // If there's a selection, use it directly
93|d7e4d7|        if selection.length > 0 && selection.location + selection.length <= length {
94|7eede4|            let selectedText = nsText.substring(with: selection)
95|726c91|            // Validate it's a word (no spaces/newlines)
96|8f774f|            if !selectedText.contains(" ") && !selectedText.contains("\n") && !selectedText.contains("\t") {
97|ac9589|                return selectedText
98|a7dc16|            }
99|1c8557|            return nil
100|5f3077|        }
101|d6ed84|        
102|7995f7|        // Otherwise, find the word at cursor position
103|4e40d9|        let cursorPos = min(selection.location, length)
104|39fe05|        return wordAt(position: cursorPos, in: nsText)
105|27e597|    }
106|b4687f|    
107|81a958|    // MARK: - Private Helpers
108|b4687f|    
109|caf3f8|    private func wordAt(position: Int, in text: NSString) -> String? {
110|178e14|        let length = text.length
111|6909b9|        guard position >= 0, position <= length else { return nil }
112|d6ed84|        
113|1af2b6|        // Find word start
114|def66a|        var start = position
115|aaa57c|        while start > 0 {
116|52497e|            let char = text.character(at: start - 1)
117|79d904|            if !isWordCharacter(char) {
118|74cfd8|                break
119|a7dc16|            }
120|eca9a8|            start -= 1
121|5f3077|        }
122|d6ed84|        
123|9f8e29|        // Find word end
124|f5c145|        var end = position
125|1d360d|        while end < length {
126|60a211|            let char = text.character(at: end)
127|79d904|            if !isWordCharacter(char) {
128|74cfd8|                break
129|a7dc16|            }
130|6378a7|            end += 1
131|5f3077|        }
132|d6ed84|        
133|5b2f94|        guard end > start else { return nil }
134|d6ed84|        
135|ab8876|        let range = NSRange(location: start, length: end - start)
136|112b3e|        return text.substring(with: range)
137|27e597|    }
138|b4687f|    
139|8b9c99|    private func isWordCharacter(_ char: unichar) -> Bool {
140|ef4ddc|        // Letters, digits, underscore
141|0f6ec6|        let scalar = Unicode.Scalar(char)
142|a78564|        if let s = scalar {
143|99d2b0|            return CharacterSet.alphanumerics.contains(s) || char == 95 // underscore
144|5f3077|        }
145|dc1500|        return false
146|27e597|    }
147|b4687f|    
148|73368d|    private func isWholeWord(range: NSRange, in text: NSString) -> Bool {
149|178e14|        let length = text.length
150|d6ed84|        
151|4aacd9|        // Check character before
152|132159|        if range.location > 0 {
153|aa5c94|            let charBefore = text.character(at: range.location - 1)
154|c5d09f|            if isWordCharacter(charBefore) {
155|473d08|                return false
156|a7dc16|            }
157|5f3077|        }
158|d6ed84|        
159|3389bc|        // Check character after
160|7de0b2|        let afterPos = range.location + range.length
161|fc83e4|        if afterPos < length {
162|c390ca|            let charAfter = text.character(at: afterPos)
163|e03575|            if isWordCharacter(charAfter) {
164|473d08|                return false
165|a7dc16|            }
166|5f3077|        }
167|d6ed84|        
168|4add8d|        return true
169|27e597|    }
170|b4687f|    
171|aac27f|    private func lineNumber(at position: Int, in text: NSString) -> Int {
172|d609cf|        var line = 0
173|8fbf6b|        var pos = 0
174|d6ed84|        
175|63746c|        while pos < position && pos < text.length {
176|93ad89|            if text.character(at: pos) == 10 { // newline
177|6204fa|                line += 1
178|a7dc16|            }
179|c9d564|            pos += 1
180|5f3077|        }
181|d6ed84|        
182|bf9a21|        return line
183|27e597|    }
184|b31277|}
185|adc83b|
186|3b0726|// MARK: - Highlight Colors
187|adc83b|
188|35651a|extension WordOccurrenceHighlighter {
189|3ac24d|    /// Background color for word occurrence highlights (matches VSCode's subtle highlight)
190|3137ba|    static func highlightColor(for theme: Theme) -> UIColor {
191|0a0869|        if theme.isDark {
192|d72402|            return UIColor(white: 1.0, alpha: 0.1)
193|b31999|        } else {
194|74dc13|            return UIColor(white: 0.0, alpha: 0.07)
195|5f3077|        }
196|27e597|    }
197|b4687f|    
198|031232|    /// Border color for word occurrence highlights
199|b0dd2d|    static func borderColor(for theme: Theme) -> UIColor {
200|0a0869|        if theme.isDark {
201|420197|            return UIColor(white: 1.0, alpha: 0.2)
202|b31999|        } else {
203|e6dbda|            return UIColor(white: 0.0, alpha: 0.15)
204|5f3077|        }
205|27e597|    }

91|73450d|        self.currentFileId = filePath

93|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
94|fa1808|        var regions: [FoldRegion] = []
95|d6ed84|        
96|69e2fe|        // Track different types of blocks

98|57aa0f|        var commentStack: [(startLine: Int, isMultiline: Bool)] = []
99|c5b1d1|        var regionStack: [(startLine: Int, label: String)] = []
100|adc83b|
101|ff8cec|        // If we detect a declaration/function/control-flow whose opening brace is on a later line,
102|724e06|        // we mark that brace line so it won't be treated as a standalone generic block.
103|945b20|        var braceLinesClaimed: Set<Int> = []
104|adc83b|
105|cce061|        // Used to prevent duplicate regions for grouped constructs (imports, // comments)
106|0cdafa|        var previousNonEmptyWasImport = false
107|8a6567|        var previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
108|d6ed84|        
109|035521|        for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
110|ec6750|            let trimmed = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
111|8a2732|            let leadingWhitespace = line.prefix { $0 == " " || $0 == "\t" }.count
112|3070d1|            
113|4be2b3|            // Skip empty lines for most detections
114|94f56f|            guard !trimmed.isEmpty else { continue }
115|adc83b|
116|096595|            // MARK: - Close blocks BEFORE opening new ones (handles "} else {" correctly)
117|3c0070|            if trimmed.hasPrefix("}") {
118|f8c18c|                // Count consecutive leading '}' so we can pop multiple blocks for lines like "}}"
119|7f8903|                let closeCount = max(1, trimmed.prefix { $0 == "}" }.count)
120|539d99|                for _ in 0..<closeCount {
121|75d4ef|                    if let lastBlock = blockStack.popLast() {
122|23d31e|                        if index - lastBlock.startLine > 1 {
123|9008b5|                            regions.append(FoldRegion(
124|c6f153|                                startLine: lastBlock.startLine,
125|419111|                                endLine: index,
126|b1c048|                                type: lastBlock.type,
127|b802b0|                                label: lastBlock.label

129|392b35|                        }
130|c9717a|                    }
131|4e2d32|                }
132|a7dc16|            }
133|3070d1|            
134|454897|            // MARK: - Region Detection (#region, #pragma mark, MARK:)
135|18ca54|            if let label = detectRegionStart(trimmed) {

137|a9d0ef|            } else if detectRegionEnd(trimmed) {
138|24137d|                if let region = regionStack.popLast() {
139|58d5c1|                    if index - region.startLine > 1 {

147|4e2d32|                }
148|a7dc16|            }
149|3070d1|

151|25e1cc|            if trimmed.hasPrefix("import ") {
152|7054bb|                if !previousNonEmptyWasImport {

154|83c6e4|                    if importEnd > index {

161|c9717a|                    }
162|4e2d32|                }
163|8edb98|                previousNonEmptyWasImport = true
164|f5a6eb|            } else {
165|cd6ad3|                previousNonEmptyWasImport = false
166|a7dc16|            }
167|3070d1|            
168|9e2e57|            // MARK: - Comment Detection

171|0b3758|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
172|08da46|            } else if trimmed.starts(with: "//") {
173|058130|                // Only create a fold region at the start of a consecutive // block
174|d2441e|                if !previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment {
175|a2e79c|                    let commentEnd = findConsecutiveComments(from: index, in: lines)
176|1111e2|                    if commentEnd > index {

178|0dc011|                            startLine: index,
179|03f2b5|                            endLine: commentEnd,

182|78dc58|                        ))
183|c9717a|                    }
184|4e2d32|                }
185|cda61a|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = true
186|fd1885|            } else if detectCommentEnd(trimmed) {
187|0b3758|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
188|e33d82|                if let comment = commentStack.popLast() {
189|bf0471|                    if index - comment.startLine > 1 {
190|22c663|                        regions.append(FoldRegion(
191|d5b0c0|                            startLine: comment.startLine,
192|46d058|                            endLine: index,
193|64e6ca|                            type: .comment,
194|0e7feb|                            label: "Comment"
195|78dc58|                        ))
196|c9717a|                    }
197|4e2d32|                }
198|f5a6eb|            } else {
199|0b3758|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
200|a7dc16|            }
201|3070d1|            
202|3d946d|            // MARK: - Class/Struct/Enum/Protocol/Extension Detection
203|2f1070|            if let declaration = detectDeclaration(trimmed) {
204|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
205|2b937f|                    blockStack.append((declaration.type, index, declaration.label))
206|fdd0e2|                } else {
207|7ec133|                    // Declaration without opening brace - look ahead for it
208|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
209|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)
210|c09b95|                        blockStack.append((declaration.type, index, declaration.label))
211|c9717a|                    }
212|4e2d32|                }
213|a7dc16|            }
214|3070d1|            
215|9273f4|            // MARK: - Function/Method Detection
216|8fb15a|            if let functionInfo = detectFunction(trimmed) {
217|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
218|072276|                    blockStack.append((.function, index, functionInfo))
219|fdd0e2|                } else {
220|ca50d4|                    // Function without opening brace - look ahead
221|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
222|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)
223|568400|                        blockStack.append((.function, index, functionInfo))
224|c9717a|                    }
225|4e2d32|                }
226|a7dc16|            }
227|3070d1|            
228|1e5bf2|            // MARK: - Control Flow Detection (if, guard, for, while, switch, etc.)
229|6b5dd6|            if let controlFlowLabel = detectControlFlow(trimmed) {
230|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
231|cb4212|                    blockStack.append((.controlFlow, index, controlFlowLabel))
232|fdd0e2|                } else {
233|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
234|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)
235|648280|                        blockStack.append((.controlFlow, index, controlFlowLabel))
236|c9717a|                    }
237|4e2d32|                }
238|a7dc16|            }
239|3070d1|            
240|b850f8|            // MARK: - Generic Block Detection
241|83f6cf|            // Avoid adding a generic block for a standalone "{" that belongs to a previously detected declaration.
242|bcf366|            if trimmed.hasSuffix("{"),
243|bd639e|               trimmed != "{",
244|f372eb|               !braceLinesClaimed.contains(index),
245|097ec3|               !isDeclarationLine(trimmed),
246|747356|               !isFunctionLine(trimmed) {
247|d74eec|                blockStack.append((.genericBlock, index, nil))
248|a7dc16|            }
249|adc83b|
250|caca44|            _ = leadingWhitespace // keep param for potential future heuristics
251|5f3077|        }
252|d6ed84|        
253|a60e7c|        // Handle any remaining unclosed blocks
254|193bf7|        while let lastBlock = blockStack.popLast() {
255|30813f|            if lines.count - 1 - lastBlock.startLine > 1 {
256|e50ab8|                regions.append(FoldRegion(
257|42046c|                    startLine: lastBlock.startLine,
258|a646f4|                    endLine: lines.count - 1,
259|68bd66|                    type: lastBlock.type,
260|2cb6f6|                    label: lastBlock.label
261|2188d8|                ))
262|a7dc16|            }
263|5f3077|        }
264|d6ed84|        
265|da4698|        // Sort regions by start line
266|e60f91|        regions.sort { $0.startLine < $1.startLine }
267|d6ed84|        
268|5f2f76|        self.foldRegions = regions
269|d6ed84|        
270|3b484c|        // Store regions in the per-file dictionary
271|8c6b47|        if let fileId = currentFileId {
272|823f0a|            foldRegionsByFile[fileId] = regions
273|5f3077|        }
274|d6ed84|        
275|83ae12|        // Restore previous fold state for this file
276|f7b7e9|        if let filePath = filePath {
277|b86c9c|            restoreFoldState(for: filePath)
278|5f3077|        }
279|d6ed84|        
280|08ca44|        updateCollapsedLines()
281|27e597|    }
282|b4687f|    
283|f96bbc|    // MARK: - Detection Helper Methods
284|b4687f|    
285|d80e09|    private func detectRegionStart(_ line: String) -> String? {
286|2a6674|        // C# / VS style regions
287|1989c4|        if line.hasPrefix("#region") {
288|08b9aa|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#region")
289|94d9b5|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Region"
290|5f3077|        }
291|39fca1|        // Objective-C pragma marks
292|667815|        if line.hasPrefix("#pragma mark") {
293|4621b4|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#pragma mark")
294|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
295|5f3077|        }
296|ccd53a|        // Swift MARK comments
297|b5e23f|        if line.contains("MARK:") {
298|504937|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "MARK:")
299|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
300|5f3077|        }
301|c9afee|        // TODO/FIXME regions
302|453092|        if line.contains("TODO:") {
303|a4bc68|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "TODO:")
304|5b14a7|            return "TODO: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
305|5f3077|        }
306|92ac0a|        if line.contains("FIXME:") {
307|0b0cff|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "FIXME:")
308|218d1e|            return "FIXME: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
309|5f3077|        }
310|c2ae65|        return nil
311|27e597|    }
312|b4687f|    
313|c62450|    private func detectRegionEnd(_ line: String) -> Bool {
314|6c0837|        return line.hasPrefix("#endregion") || 
315|325a81|               line == "// MARK: -" ||
316|52ea28|               line.hasPrefix("#pragma mark -")
317|27e597|    }
318|b4687f|    
319|c6e97d|    private func detectCommentStart(_ line: String) -> Bool {
320|1cbff6|        return line.hasPrefix("/*") && !line.contains("*/")
321|27e597|    }
322|b4687f|    
323|ea9113|    private func detectCommentEnd(_ line: String) -> Bool {
324|d521b7|        return line.contains("*/") && !line.hasPrefix("/*")
325|27e597|    }
326|b4687f|    
327|766920|    private func findConsecutiveImports(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int {
328|b1d128|        var endIndex = startIndex
329|2c6406|        for i in startIndex..<lines.count {
330|ac4d84|            let trimmed = lines[i].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
331|25e1cc|            if trimmed.hasPrefix("import ") {
332|d549e2|                endIndex = i
333|4a3466|            } else if !trimmed.isEmpty {
334|74cfd8|                break
335|a7dc16|            }
336|5f3077|        }
337|7678e6|        return endIndex
338|27e597|    }
339|b4687f|    
340|fd2e13|    private func findConsecutiveComments(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int {
341|b1d128|        var endIndex = startIndex
342|2c6406|        for i in startIndex..<lines.count {
343|ac4d84|            let trimmed = lines[i].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
344|730926|            if trimmed.starts(with: "//") {
345|d549e2|                endIndex = i
346|4a3466|            } else if !trimmed.isEmpty {
347|74cfd8|                break
348|a7dc16|            }
349|5f3077|        }
350|7678e6|        return endIndex
351|27e597|    }
352|b4687f|    
353|763883|    private func detectDeclaration(_ line: String) -> (type: FoldRegion.FoldType, label: String)? {
354|3ccee6|        func matchName(pattern: String) -> String? {
355|6cc0c4|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return nil }
356|f2f390|            guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
357|ebf922|                  match.numberOfRanges >= 2,
358|762e94|                  let r = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line)
359|f5f042|            else { return nil }
360|480e4a|            return String(line[r])
361|5f3077|        }
362|adc83b|
363|f67078|        // Allow leading attributes like "@MainActor", "@available(...)"
364|0c5ed8|        // Allow common modifiers in any order (best-effort).
365|ca2c54|        let prefix = #"^(?:\s*@\w+(?:\([^\)]*\))?\s+)*(?:\s*(?:public|private|internal|fileprivate|open|final|indirect|lazy|static|override|mutating|nonmutating)\s+)*"#
366|adc83b|
367|cf49c1|        // IMPORTANT: avoid treating "class func"/"class var" as a type declaration.
368|e1fc33|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"class\s+(?!func\b|var\b|let\b)([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
369|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
370|5f3077|        }
371|adc83b|
372|8d6e9b|        // Actor (Swift concurrency) – fold like a class/struct
373|8d98f9|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"actor\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
374|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
375|5f3077|        }
376|adc83b|
377|c629a9|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"struct\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
378|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
379|5f3077|        }
380|adc83b|
381|75283c|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"enum\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
382|0f57db|            return (.enumDeclaration, name)
383|5f3077|        }
384|adc83b|
385|bb35e5|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"protocol\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
386|982dbc|            return (.protocolDeclaration, name)
387|5f3077|        }
388|adc83b|
389|940527|        // Extensions can include dotted names (Foo.Bar)
390|b2a8c3|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"extension\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_\.]*)"#) {
391|fbf8d2|            return (.extension, name)
392|5f3077|        }
393|adc83b|
394|c2ae65|        return nil
395|27e597|    }
396|b4687f|    
397|a1a6f6|    private func detectFunction(_ line: String) -> String? {
398|d7dbc1|        // Function detection with visibility modifiers
399|2861c1|        let visibilityKeywords = ["public", "private", "internal", "fileprivate", "static", "class", "override", "final", "mutating", "convenience"]
400|d6ed84|        
401|981adf|        // Check for 'func' keyword
402|db4a2c|        if line.contains("func ") {
403|25ca5f|            // Extract function name
404|270a0d|            let funcPattern = "func\\s+(\\w+)"
405|b5e31c|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: funcPattern),
406|d7fb50|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
407|9e61c1|               let nameRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line) {
408|456ee3|                let functionName = String(line[nameRange])
409|185b9c|                // Check for parameters to create label
410|bbf605|                if let parenStart = line.firstIndex(of: "("), let parenEnd = line.firstIndex(of: ")") {
411|2d3254|                    let params = String(line[parenStart...parenEnd])
412|929aa2|                    return "\(functionName)\(params)"
413|4e2d32|                }
414|8aa06e|                return functionName
415|a7dc16|            }
416|5f3077|        }
417|d6ed84|        
418|4d99b7|        // Init detection
419|a1d502|        if let initName = extractName(from: line, prefix: "init", visibility: visibilityKeywords) {
420|3d8f8b|            return "\(initName)"
421|5f3077|        }
422|d6ed84|        
423|2a2371|        // Deinit detection
424|70e552|        if line.contains("deinit") {
425|9db7b1|            return "deinit"
426|5f3077|        }
427|d6ed84|        
428|307e69|        // Computed property with get/set
429|f3cc39|        if line.hasPrefix("var ") && (line.contains("{") || line.contains("get")) {
430|950394|            if let varName = extractVariableName(from: line) {
431|99146d|                return varName
432|a7dc16|            }
433|5f3077|        }
434|d6ed84|        
435|c2ae65|        return nil
436|27e597|    }
437|b4687f|    
438|1ec945|    private func detectControlFlow(_ line: String) -> String? {
439|bad9a4|        let controlFlowPatterns = [
440|0bf98c|            ("if ", "if"),
441|9fe51e|            ("guard ", "guard"),
442|62af45|            ("else if", "else if"),
443|7da324|            ("else", "else"),
444|99fc8d|            ("for ", "for"),
445|37f5a4|            ("while ", "while"),
446|402c75|            ("repeat", "repeat"),
447|f81318|            ("switch ", "switch"),
448|ff609c|            ("case ", "case"),
449|d493af|            ("default:", "default"),
450|0ca7b9|            ("do ", "do"),
451|30a630|            ("catch", "catch")
452|220505|        ]
453|d6ed84|        
454|186e39|        for (pattern, label) in controlFlowPatterns {
455|3cfde0|            if line.contains(pattern) {
456|6ef273|                return label
457|a7dc16|            }
458|5f3077|        }
459|c2ae65|        return nil
460|27e597|    }
461|b4687f|    
462|143320|    private func extractName(from line: String, prefix: String, visibility: [String]) -> String? {
463|47867c|        var components = line.components(separatedBy: .whitespaces).filter { !$0.isEmpty }
464|d6ed84|        
465|b4fd50|        // Remove visibility modifiers
466|6bbc02|        components = components.filter { !visibility.contains($0) }
467|d6ed84|        
468|ad7b7d|        // Find prefix index
469|524a3a|        if let prefixIndex = components.firstIndex(where: { $0 == prefix }),
470|22dab3|           prefixIndex + 1 < components.count {
471|5c4751|            var name = components[prefixIndex + 1]
472|43f61d|            // Remove colons and other trailing characters
473|dcb9cb|            name = name.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? name
474|3f8c05|            name = name.components(separatedBy: "<").first ?? name
475|dcb9cb|            name = name.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? name
476|470adb|            return name
477|5f3077|        }
478|c2ae65|        return nil
479|27e597|    }
480|b4687f|    
481|c68b6f|    private func extractVariableName(from line: String) -> String? {
482|6e7aec|        let components = line.components(separatedBy: .whitespaces).filter { !$0.isEmpty }
483|a2b557|        if components.count >= 2, components[0] == "var" {
484|696097|            var varName = components[1]
485|cdb291|            varName = varName.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? varName
486|0300ee|            varName = varName.components(separatedBy: "=").first ?? varName
487|c7c291|            return varName
488|5f3077|        }
489|c2ae65|        return nil
490|27e597|    }
491|b4687f|    
492|9d571e|    private func findOpeningBrace(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int? {
493|1ccc79|        for i in startIndex..<min(startIndex + 5, lines.count) {
494|539363|            if lines[i].contains("{") {
495|883981|                return i
496|a7dc16|            }
497|5f3077|        }
498|c2ae65|        return nil
499|27e597|    }
500|b4687f|    
501|a3e3d4|    private func isDeclarationLine(_ line: String) -> Bool {
502|3d6d16|        let keywords = ["class", "struct", "enum", "protocol", "extension", "init", "func"]
503|ce9d51|        return keywords.contains { line.contains("\($0) ") }
504|27e597|    }
505|b4687f|    
506|785057|    private func isFunctionLine(_ line: String) -> Bool {
507|00501b|        return line.contains("func ") || line.contains("init ")
508|27e597|    }
509|b4687f|    
510|70bda3|    private func detectBlockEnd(_ line: String, leadingWhitespace: Int) -> Bool {
511|ae2f5c|        return (line.hasPrefix("}") || line.starts(with: "}")) && 
512|9c322d|               (line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) == "}" || 
513|65b3d9|                line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces).hasPrefix("}"))
514|27e597|    }
515|b4687f|    
516|94cc0f|    // MARK: - Fold State Persistence
517|b4687f|    
518|786ea9|    /// Saves the current fold state to UserDefaults
519|1043ae|    func saveFoldState(for filePath: String) {
520|d1c5a5|        let key = UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix + filePath
